title: Associate Director - Portfolio & Content Marketing
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
As an Associate Director, Portfolio \& Content Marketing within the Software Engineering Group (SEG), you will serve as the strategic messaging anchor for one of Cognizant's most dynamic and fast\-growing service line groups. You will own the end\-to\-end content and positioning strategy across SEG's full offering portfolio — spanning AI\-led Software Engineering, IT Modernization, IT Operations, and AI Assurance — ensuring consistent, compelling narratives that resonate with C\-suite and enterprise buyers globally.
  
You will act as a trusted strategic partner to the SEG Marketing leadership, driving messaging excellence, competitive differentiation, and thought leadership across all buyer\-facing channels, while overseeing content quality and consistency across the team.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Own and maintain the messaging architecture across all SEG offerings, developing a comprehensive messaging matrix per offering — aligned by buyer persona, vertical, and pain point.
  
Drive content strategy, creation, and quality, acting as a strategic partner to the Director, Service Line Marketing Leader on SEG's positioning and narrative.
  
Define ABM account strategy — including account selection, tiering, and messaging angles — and brief Cognizant's central campaign structure for execution.
  
Oversee the output of the Executive Communications \& Social function, ensuring consistency and quality across all external\-facing content.
  
Prepare analyst briefing materials for Gartner, Forrester, and IDC, and lead competitive differentiation work including quarterly battlecard updates.
  
Commission and review thought leadership content — including PoV articles, solution narratives, white papers, and industry perspectives — in collaboration with SEG SMEs and external writers.
  
Maintain market and competitive intelligence on technology shifts and evolving client adoption patterns to continuously refresh SEG's narrative.
  
Partner with the GTM Associate Director to ensure all sales enablement materials reflect current positioning before distribution to the sales community.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
12\+ years of product marketing or portfolio marketing experience within IT services or technology consulting.
  
MBA (Marketing/IT) and Engineering degree preferred.
  
Demonstrated ability to build and own messaging frameworks for complex, multi\-offering technology services portfolios.
  
Exceptional written English with a strong ability to review, edit, and elevate C\-suite\-level content; a published portfolio of B2B thought leadership is strongly preferred.
  
Experience preparing analyst briefing materials and competitive intelligence decks for technology services.
  
Proven ability to partner with senior SMEs and offering leaders to translate insights into compelling business narratives.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Experience with ABM program design — account selection, tiering, and content mapping.
  
Familiarity with AI, Cloud, Data Engineering, or ERP services marketing.
  
Prior exposure to BFSI, HCLS, P\&R, or CMT vertical marketing.
  
Ability to manage multiple priorities and thrive in a complex, matrixed, cross\-functional environment.
  
Strategic agility to navigate dynamic business contexts and evolving portfolio landscapes.
  
**Messaging Impact:** A clear, consistent, and differentiated narrative across all SEG offerings and buyer touchpoints.
  
**Content Excellence:** High\-quality thought leadership and sales enablement assets that drive engagement and pipeline.
  
**Competitive Positioning:** Up\-to\-date battlecards and analyst materials that strengthen SEG's market differentiation.
  
**Stakeholder Satisfaction:** Positive feedback from SEG leadership, sales, and GTM teams on content quality and strategic alignment.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. This is a hybrid role based in Bangalore, requiring regular in\-office presence and flexibility across US, UK, and India time zones. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting and may change based on business and client requirements. Rest assured, we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role

title: FBS Agile Dev Team Member III with Java, AS400
description:
Agile Dev Team Members have collective responsibility for the design, development, testing and/or deployment of system functionality. Agile Dev Team Member II with primarily a development discipline provides technical feasibility using basic coding methods and adheres to coding standards to ensure consistent style and format. Ensures systems are high in code and component quality, and are easily modified to support future requirements with support and guidance of more senior developers or architects. Agile Dev Team Member II with primarily a testing discipline ensures the end product meets the business acceptance criteria and non\-functional requirements. Defines and execute tests early, often, and at multiple levels depending on their level of experience. Based on their business products, processes and system knowledge, they provide broad level of thinking for exceptions and other unexpected ways users may interact with systems. They utilize basic to intermediate testing techniques and tools. The Agile Dev Team Member II is moderately capable of working on more than one type of task and is somewhat limited in their ability to consistently pull the next highest priority work item.


Essential Job Functions
Demonstrates understanding to customer needs by interpreting customer needs into viable solutions, providing input into system design. Effectively writes and refines user stories, including clear and accurate acceptance criteria. Performs detailed impact assessments relating people, processes and/or technology, and estimates user stories using relative sizing of story points. Identifies and raises issues and risks with functional design. Partners with the Product Owner to confirm code and acceptance tests reflect the desired functionality. Executes Test\-Driven Development (TDD) and Behavior\-Driven Development (BDD) to build in quality. Agile Dev Team Member II with primarily a development discipline: Codes instructions for computer programs/objects/components; con figures packaged software. Documents and implements programs according to standards and conventions. Quality checks program code, related objects and documentation. Delivers working code each sprint. Demonstrates ability to read and write simple code. Modifies code in an existing file. Executes basic data creation tools and reads automation test results. Demonstrates understanding fundamentals of automation tools and framework. Agile Dev Team Member II with primarily a testing discipline: Analyzes system and business requirements for testability. Identifies common errors that occur in standard application testing. Develops, documents, executes, and maintains test cases and test data. Reports status of test plan execution through defect logs and defect tracking system. Defines comprehensive test plans needed to achieve appropriate level of coverage. Analyzes test results and assists with trouble\-shooting and root cause analysis. Utilizes basic testing tools such as data creation, run batch processes and test automation tools. Applies Risk Based Testing techniques to planning and execution. Writes test cases describing business behavior to facilitate automation with some guidance. Contributes to the overall test strategy with limited ability. Assists with resolution of environmental issues. Supports application development, implementation, and user training activities, as required. Participates in key ceremonies to drive execution, improve flow and ensure transparency with limited guidance from a senior team member. Plans work via the preparation for and participation in Program Increment (PI) Planning and Sprint Planning, which includes developing and committing to Team PI Objectives and Sprint goals. Demonstrates working code to Product and Business Owners and supports the Product Owner in the execution of the iteration and PI System Demos. Actively participates in the Sprint Retrospectives and Inspect \& Adapt to timely discuss opportunities for improvement and are responsible for carrying out the execution of improvement stories. Participates in Daily Stands\-ups to assess progress toward sprint goals and raise impediments. Participates in on\-going and scheduled Backlog Refinement sessions. Demonstrates ongoing desire for continuous improvement and building knowledge in area of expertise. Actively seeks out development opportunities to further develop T\-shaped skills and become a more cross\-functional contributor. Practices continuous exploration, continuous integration and continuous deployment necessary for building the Continuous Delivery Pipeline and implementing DevOps. Offers innovative ideas within area of focus to improve processes. Conducts ongoing assessment of current state and seeks out opportunities for improvement. Actively participates in Agile Dev Team Member Community of Practice (CoP). Plans and conducts CoP sessions. Effectively manages the communications and action items resulting from the sessions.

 **Requirements**  

Total Experience: 07 to 09 Years


Relevant Experience:07 to 09 Years


Work Timings (India): 01:00 PM to 10:00 PM IST


Must to have Skills : Java, AS400, Microservices , Eclipse, Rational Application Developer  



  

  

**Benefits**  

Competitive compensation and benefits package:

* Competitive salary and performance\-based bonuses
* Comprehensive benefits package
* Career development and training opportunities
* Flexible work arrangements (remote and/or office\-based)
* Dynamic and inclusive work culture within a globally renowned group
* Private Health Insurance
* Pension Plan
* Paid Time Off
* Training \& Development

Note: Benefits differ based on employee level.

**About Capgemini**


Capgemini is a global leader in partnering with companies to transform and manage their business by harnessing the power of technology. The Group is guided everyday by its purpose of unleashing human energy through technology for an inclusive and sustainable future. It is a responsible and diverse organization of over 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. **Wipro Limited (NYSE:** WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future\-ready, sustainable businesses. **Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
The purpose of the role is overall development of the target Architecture through defining the technology roadmap for own business/ domain. Recognized as the subject matter expert for a specific domain and provides expert advice \& guidance to different business stakeholders
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
  

Develop architectural application for the new deals/ major change requests in existing deals
  
Creates enterprise wide business/ domain architecture deliverables (enabling, diagnostic and actionable) focused on the target audience and its issues and opportunities
  
Look for opportunities to use high\-level business and operating models (business capability and value chain), combined with or relating to business, people, information, technology and solutions.
  
Contributes to the Target Architecture, by developing and maintaining the technology roadmap for area of expertise and ensuring that roadmap remains aligned to the Business Strategy
  
Recognizing innovative use of technology for increasing performance measures
  
Works with other IS and business stakeholders to drive the development and adoption of the target architecture for own domain
  
Establish domain specific standards, near/mid\-term strategy, and roadmaps, in adherence to, and in support of Enterprise standards, strategy, and roadmaps.
  
Guide a solution from concept to delivery \- envision and create solutions that meet requirements
  
Prove the feasibility of a design; and can ultimately be implemented and supported in the Production environment
  
Oversee product/ platform engineering, protocol map development, virtualization as per the business solution requirements
  
Apply architectural and engineering concepts to design a solution that meets operational requirements, such as scalability, maintainability, security, reliability, extensibility, flexibility, availability, and manageability.
  
Participate and lead research and development efforts (proof of concept, prototypes), as subject matter experts, when introducing new technologies, in conjunction with team and Product Owners
  
͏
  
Partners with IT and line of business functional groups to communicate and clarify business needs, contributes to the development of long\-range system plans, and ensures that IT products, services and processes are aligned with line of business needs.
  
Define high\-level migration plans to address the gaps between the current and future state, typically in sync with the IT budgeting or other capital planning processes
  
Provides technology consulting to solution architects, junior staff members, and others who are using or modifying multiple domain technologies within a solution, insuring the technology operates coherently to meet overall needs
  
Interaction with EA, OEMs, Technical leads for defining business solutions
  
Depending on the clientÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂs need with particular standards and technology stacks create complete RFPs
  
Clearly articulate and sell architectural targets, recommendations and reusable patterns and accordingly propose investment roadmaps
  
Provide solution of RFPÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂs received from clients and ensure overall design assurance
  
Develop a direction to manage the portfolio of all the business/ domain requirements including systems, shared infrastructure services in order to better match business outcome objectives
  
Analyse technology environment, enterprise specifics, client requirements to set a collaboration solution for the big/small data
  
Provide technical leadership to the implementation of custom solutions through thoughtful use of modern technology
  
Define and understand current issues and problems and identify improvements
  
Evaluate and recommend solutions to integrate with overall technology ecosystem keeping consistency throughout
  
Understand the root cause problem in integrating business and product units
  
Validate the solution/ prototype from technology, cost structure and customer differentiation point of view
  
Collaborating with sales and delivery leadership teams to identify future needs and requirements
  
Tracks industry and application trends and relates these to planning current and future IT needs
  
͏
  
Understanding enterprise requirements and provide solutions for technical ecosystem
  
Creating Intellectual Property in forms of services, patterns, models and organizational approaches.
  
Bring knowledge of automation in application by embracing Agile and dev\-ops principles to reduce manual part
  
Responsible for successfully applying the technology in their domain to solve business problems in a supportable, cost effective, way
  
Analyze the current technology environment to detect critical deficiencies and recommend solutions for improvement. In addition, analyze the technology industry and market trends to determine their potential impact on the enterprise as well as on the enterprise technology architecture
  
Develop a direction to manage the portfolio of to\-be\-solutions including systems, shared infrastructure services, applications in order to better match business outcome objectives
  
Provide platform to create standardize tools, uniform design and techniques are maintained to reduce costs of maintenance
  
Seamless integration and advising of new and existing systems to eliminate potential problems and maintain data structure and bring value in terms of development
  
Serve as technical owner and point of contact for domain specific solutions and provide technical leadership to the design, development and implementation of custom solutions through thoughtful use of modern technology
  
͏
  
Enable Delivery Teams by providing optimal delivery solutions/ frameworks
  
Build and maintain relationships with executives, technical leaders, product owners, peer architects and other stakeholders to become a trusted advisor
  
Collaborate with enterprise architect for translating business strategy to execution
  
Develops and establishes relevant technical, business process and overall support metrics (KPI/SLA) to drive results
  
Bring value in terms of quality in development activities by leveraging cloud based and scalable infrastructure
  
Identify technical, process, structural risks and prepare a risk mitigation plan for all the projects
  
Ensure quality assurance of all the architecture or design decisions and provides technical mitigation support to the delivery teams
  
Recommend tools for reuse, automation for improved productivity and reduced cycle times
  
Leads the development and maintenance of enterprise framework and related artefacts
  
Develops trust and builds effective working relationships through respectful, collaborative engagement across individual product teams
  
Provide architectural oversight of projects; ensure requirements are in alignment with business strategies and business architecture roadmap/framework.
  
Ensure solutions developed across organization are aligned to enterprise architecture standards and principles, leverage common solutions and services, and meet financial targets (cost and benefits).
  
Negotiate, manage and coordinate with the client teams to ensure all requirements are met and create an impact of solution proposed
  
Demonstrate thought leadership with strong technical capability in front of the client to win the confidence and act as a trusted advisor

**Experience:** 8\-10 Years .

title: AVP – Head of India Tech Consulting & Strategic Deals
description:
Leading at Cognizant
  
This is a Leadership role at Cognizant. We believe how you lead is as important as what you deliver. Cognizant leaders at every level: Drive our business strategy and inspire teams around our future. Live the leadership behaviors , leading themselves, others and the business. Uphold our Values , role modeling them in every action and decision. Nurture our people and culture , creating a workplace where all can thrive.
  
At Cognizant, leadership transcends titles and is embodied in actions and behaviors. We empower our leaders at every level to drive business strategy, inspire teams, uphold our values, and foster an inclusive culture.
  
The Role
  
Cognizant helps companies modernize technology, reimagine processes and transform experiences so they stay ahead in a fast\-changing world.
  
Our Cognizant consulting group is looking for a Head of India Tech Consulting \& Strategic Deals to join our journey. We are looking for a deep tech person with strong experience in AI consulting, along with a multi\-industry experience in the Indian market; a person who has worked with top tier clients and has a strong network in the industry.
  
As a member of our team, you will be responsible for leading the India consulting arm of Cognizant and helping the company grow by managing top tier clients, striking strategic deals; while building a high performing team.
  
The Consulting Partner role is pivotal in driving strategic IT consulting initiatives within our organization. With a focus on delivering exceptional client solutions, the candidate will leverage their extensive experience to enhance business operations and foster innovation. This role requires a deep understanding of IT consulting, ensuring seamless integration of technology solutions to meet client needs and organizational goals.
  
**Every choice we make aligns to our vision:** to become the pre\-eminent technology services partner to the world’s top companies.
  
At Cognizant, we are a high\-performing team with heart. Our solutions are in demand and we’re passionate about making a difference. If you have experience with the above, you are a selfless leader and are committed to a client\-facing environment; if you want to grow your career with a team that wants to build something great together, we want to hear from you! Apply now!
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Lead the development and execution of IT consulting strategies that align with client objectives and organizational goals.
  
  

Oversee the implementation of technology solutions ensuring they meet client specifications and enhance business operations.
  
  

Provide expert guidance on IT consulting best practices fostering innovation and efficiency within client organizations.
  
  

Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to deliver comprehensive consulting services that drive business success.
  
  

Analyze client needs and develop tailored IT solutions that address specific challenges and opportunities.
  
  

Manage client relationships ensuring satisfaction and long\-term partnership through effective communication and service delivery.
  
  

Drive continuous improvement in consulting processes leveraging industry trends and insights to enhance service offerings.
  
  

Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations maintaining the highest level of professionalism and integrity.
  
  

Facilitate workshops and training sessions to empower client teams with the knowledge and skills needed for successful technology adoption.
  
  

Monitor project progress and performance providing regular updates to stakeholders and adjusting strategies as needed.
  
  

Utilize data analytics to assess the impact of consulting initiatives and identify areas for further optimization.
  
  

Support business development efforts by identifying new opportunities and contributing to proposal development.
  
  

Build, mentor, and inspire a high\-performing consulting team, fostering a culture of collaboration, innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement.
  
  

Consistently demonstrate the Cognizant Way to Lead, which means operating with Personal Leadership (building trust, collaboration, and inclusion), Organizational Leadership (driving vision and purpose, demonstrating a strategic and enterprise mindset, and creating and communicating a bold direction that inspires purpose), and Business Leadership (exemplifying client focus, managing ambiguity with accountability and results, and operating with financial acumen).
  
  

**What you need to have to be considered:**  

20\+ years of experience working in IT consulting, AI \& deep tech; with a wide breadth of experience in multiple industries.
  
  

Possess extensive experience in IT consulting, demonstrating a deep understanding of Indian industry trends and client needs.
  
  

Have a proven track record of successful project management and client relationship building.
  
  

Exhibit strong analytical skills with the ability to develop and implement effective technology solutions.

title: Deputy Manager | Credit Risk Quant | Delhi | Regulatory & Financial Risk
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108560
Date: Jul 16, 2026
Location: Delhi
Designation: Deputy Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Deputy Manager \| Credit Risk Quant \| Delhi \| Regulatory \& Financial Risk**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 108560
* **Location**: Delhi
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP

**The Team**



Deloitte Strategy, Risk \& Transaction helps entities mitigate risk while discovering new opportunities to create value. Our end\-to\-end risk services span all domains, from managing strategic risks in the C\-Suite to improving board oversight, and from balancing financial and environmental policies to addressing cyber threats.**Learn more about Risk, Regulatory \& Forensic**)

  


**Your work profile**


* Perform independent validation of Advanced IRB / Foundation IRB models including:
* PD, LGD, EAD, and CCF modelling methodologies
* Rating system design and performance
* RWA attribution and capital impact assessment
* Assess model methodologies and assumptions for diverse wholesale product exposures including:
* Corporate and SME lending (term loans, revolving credit, working capital facilities)
* Project and infrastructure finance
* Financial institutions \& sovereign portfolios
* Commercial Real Estate (CRE) and income\-producing real estate
* Trade finance, supply chain, and asset\-based lending
* Leveraged finance and private capital exposures
* Evaluate model conceptual soundness, data representativeness, risk differentiation, and calibration methodology
* Review and challenge:
* Model segmentation, overrides, downturn calibration, and economic cycle considerations
* Treatment of collateral, guarantees, credit mitigants, and default definitions
* Regulatory compliance with Basel III/IV IRB requirements and regional supervisory rules
* Conduct model performance testing including:
* Discriminatory power, back\-testing, stability monitoring, sensitivity, and benchmarking
* Prepare high\-quality validation documentation with clear findings, limitations, and remediation actions
* Support regulatory engagements, addressing model findings, remediation evidence, and audit requests
* Partner with Model Development, Credit Policy, Data Governance, and Capital Management teams to ensure models are fit\-for\-purpose and well\-controlled


**Key skills required:**


* Experience with Corporate lending, project finance, commercial real estate, private equity exposures
* Stress testing frameworks (CCAR/ICAAP) and IRB\-to\-IFRS 9 model linkages
* Regulatory interactions with PRA, ECB, Fed/OCC, OSFI, etc.
* Ability to articulate quantitative findings to non\-technical senior stakeholders
* Core Competencies
* Effective challenge and independent risk oversight mindset
* High attention to detail and documentation discipline
* Stakeholder influencing and relationship management
* Ability to manage multiple validations under tight timelines
* Desired qualifications
* Experience in modelling or validation of Wholesale IRB capital models, IFRS9, Climate Risk Modelling experience within large banking organizations
* Strong technical skills in Python, R, SAS, SQL and knowledge of credit modelling statistics
* Deep knowledge of:
* IRB rating system architecture and approvals
* Basel III/IV capital rules for wholesale credit
* Model risk governance expectations (e.g., SR 11\-7\)
* Strong analytical judgment and written communication skills
* Desired qualifications Master’s degree or higher in Quantitative Finance, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or related field
* 4 to 6 years of experience in modelling or validation of Wholesale IRB capital models, IFRS9, Climate Risk Modelling experience within large banking organizations
* Strong technical skills in Python, R, SAS, SQL and knowledge of credit modelling statistics

title: AI-enabled Medical Devices Engineering
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Your Role**
=============


As a **Technical Lead – AI\-Enabled Medical Devices Engineering**, you will be responsible for leading technical execution, solution design, AI adoption, and engineering transformation initiatives for Medical Devices and Life Sciences clients. You will work closely with delivery teams, solution architects, AI specialists, quality and regulatory SMEs, and client stakeholders to deliver scalable, compliant, and productivity\-driven engineering solutions.


In this role, you will:


* Lead technical solutioning and delivery support for Medical Devices, Digital Health, Product Engineering, Software Engineering, Quality Engineering, V\&V, and Sustaining Engineering initiatives
* Develop AI\-enabled productivity solutions leveraging LLMs, RAG, AI agents, workflow automation, engineering analytics, and AI\-assisted SDLC approaches.
* Collaborate with AI CoEs and delivery teams to build demos, POCs, accelerators, and transformation roadmaps.
* Support Medical Device product lifecycle activities spanning concept, development, verification, validation, release, maintenance, sustenance, and post\-market quality.
* Drive delivery readiness through architecture reviews, risk assessments, implementation planning, issue analysis, and technical governance.

**Your Profile**
----------------


* **12–18\+ years of experience** in Engineering Services, Product Engineering, Medical Devices, Life Sciences, Software Development, Quality Engineering, or Technical Leadership roles.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Biomedical Engineering, Technology, or a related discipline.
* Strong experience in architecture reviews, solution design, technical governance, engineering transformation, and delivery leadership.
* Hands\-on expertise in POCs, prototype development, framework design, estimation, technical risk assessment, and delivery readiness planning.
* Experience with AI\-enabled engineering approaches including GenAI use cases, LLMs, RAG, AI Agents, AI\-assisted development, testing, documentation, defect analytics, and prompt engineering.
* Strong understanding of software engineering, test automation, quality engineering, V\&V, digital engineering, and product development practices.
* Deep knowledge of Medical Device product lifecycle management, including requirements, design, verification, validation, release, maintenance, and post\-market support.
**What You’ll Love About Working Here**
=======================================


* Opportunity to lead cutting\-edge AI\-enabled engineering transformation initiatives within Medical Devices and Life Sciences.
* Exposure to emerging technologies including GenAI, Digital Health, Test Automation, Engineering Analytics, and Connected Products.
* Access to continuous learning opportunities and certifications in cloud, AI, and engineering technologies.

**About Capgemini in India**
============================


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations realize their future through technology, data, and people. With nearly **60 years of heritage**, Capgemini is a responsible and diverse organization with **420,000 team members across more than 50 countries**. The Group reported **2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion**.


Capgemini in India comprises nearly **235,000 team members** working across 13 locations including Bengaluru, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.

title: Specialist - Clients, Strategy and Growth - Leadership Excellence
description:
**Clients, Strategy and Growth – Leadership Excellence Specialist**


The Clients, Strategy \& Growth (CS\&G) Leadership Excellence (LX) Specialist role sits at the intersection of business operations and data management, supporting talent\-related and performance\-management efforts for Partners/Principals (PPs), Managing Directors (MDs), and Leaders (Ls) aligned to CS\&G.


This role requires a detail\-oriented professional who can support the CS\&G LX team across a range of priorities throughout the year, including data collection, validation, reporting, dashboard updates, performance\-cycle support, and special projects for PPs/MDs/Ls. The consultant will work closely with senior team members to maintain accurate data, support process execution, and help drive timely delivery of primarily recurring talent activities.


The ideal candidate is highly analytical, technically curious, and comfortable working with data across systems to produce clear reporting and actionable insights. Success in this role also requires strong data architecture instincts and a systems mindset, with the desire to learn how the full performance management data ecosystem works, including where data resides and how systems connect. The role requires sound judgement and the ability to manage highly confidential information with discretion.

**Work you'll do**


As a Specialist, Project Management on the CS\&G Leadership Excellence team, you will be responsible for:

* Maintain and reconcile quantitative metrics for PPs/MDs/Ls, including data collection, validation, file management, system updates, and ongoing maintenance.
* Work with structured and unstructured data to support reporting, analysis, and leadership requests, ensuring accuracy and consistency across sources.
* Analyze large, complex data sets in a fast\-paced environment while maintaining data integrity and consistency across sources.
* Identify opportunities to improve current processes, automate manual steps, and enhance reporting quality using analytics and AI\-enabled tools where appropriate.
* Enhance reporting frameworks and analytics capabilities by anticipating and staying in front of upstream risks, surfacing issues early, and improving data quality.

**The team**


The CS\&G LX team serves as a strategic adviser to CS\&G PPs/MDs/Ls and CS\&G Leadership, along with implementing the firm’s talent priorities by delivering a seamless, integrated process across performance management, leadership development, succession, talent relations, transactions, promotions/admissions, and strategic initiatives. The team is also the central catalyst for PPs/MDs/Ls with Green Dot roles, ensuring that their Green Dot performance management process is fair and consistent, regardless of their business alignment.

**Location: Hyderabad/Bengaluru**

**Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM**

**Qualifications**

**Required:**

* Bachelor's Degree with 4\+ years' relevant experience
* Highly proficient in Excel (e.g., pivot tables, calculated fields, dashboarding/data visualization; macros a plus) and proficient Microsoft PowerPoint (e.g., storyboarding, formatting, slide master).
* Experience using Gen AI and other technology trends.
* Exceptional attention to detail.
* Ability to perform thorough quality assurance checks on deliverables, including reviewing inputs and outputs for accuracy and ensuring data quality across multiple data sources.
* Strong project management and execution skills, including the ability to manage multiple deliverables, work under pressure, and maintain high\-quality outputs.
* Demonstrated ability to support and drive workstreams from start to finish, including meeting deadlines, navigating obstacles, and keeping work moving forward.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  

  

**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: CXO - End User Support - Services Specialist, IT Services- Chennai
description:
**CXO – End User Support**
A person having high aspirations and passion to provide Technology support to accomplish their vision in Deloitte. CXO is the vital point of contact for all IT related incidents and service requests. Ability to demonstrate and communicate effectively with a wide variety of people in a dynamic, fast\-paced environment, which provides services in a professional manner, through email, phone, in person (Walk\-in Customers). You need to be a highly motivated team player with the skills and ability to manage ambiguity.
**Work you’ll do**


§ Deliver world\-class customer service to every customer visiting the CXO Walk\-Up.
§ Provide hardware and application support, including asset management and tracking for firm hardware and software, in alignment with established processes.
§ Install, image, and configure firm\-standard builds on laptops and desktops (Windows), as well as Macs and Chromebooks.
§ Serve as a point of contact for external customers and vendors, as needed.
§ Execute manager\-directed technology initiatives, including implementing new tools and capabilities under the direction of immediate supervisors.
§ Provide 24/7 support in accordance with CXO service level agreements (SLAs).
§ Deploy and support mobile devices, including user guidance and recommendations, activations, account changes, configuration, testing, troubleshooting, and issue resolution.
§ Build strong relationships with business users at all levels by promoting CXO services, understanding business needs, owing up issues through resolution, and sharing relevant technology updates.
§ Follow and reinforce standard processes and controls by documenting issues and resolutions in knowledge bases, and service desk tickets; meeting service level targets (SLTs) through accurate service/asset records, data retention, and PC compliance activities; and performing password resets.
§ Support and train users on audio/visual (A/V) and conferencing technology, including projectors and video conferencing systems, with daily checks and event start\-up support (including television/cable systems where applicable).
§ Provide onsite “hands and feet” support for infrastructure teams (LAN, WAN, and telephony) when local support is required.
§ Stay current on emerging and upcoming technologies, proactively evaluating their relevance and potential impact.


§ Assess existing processes end\-to\-end to identify gaps, inefficiencies, and opportunities for continuous improvement.


§ Apply innovative, solution\-oriented thinking to redesign workflows and propose practical, scalable enhancements that improve outcomes and customer experience.


**The team**


CXO team is proud to be part of Deloitte’s Technology Services spread across Hyderabad, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Delhi, Pune, Kolkata and Chennai. This team is responsible for accomplishing various Technology support tasks at the CXO walk\-up to deliver world class technology support. This team takes care of new hire laptop setup, End of Lease activity, PDA support, Printer support \& VC support at local offices.
**Qualifications**
------------------


**Required:**
* B. Tech, BE \& Engineering Graduates


* Technical troubleshooting, Strong Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, Power Point, Teams), Zoom, Windows and MAC operating systems, mobile device hardware and software, networking, video conferencing, Audio/Video, Telephony equipment, Active Directory administration will be an advantage.


**Preferred:**
* ITIL – Certification
* Microsoft MCSE, A\+, CCNA – Preferable

  

  

* A / N\+ Certification a plus
* Industry certifications such as Dell or HP a plus
* Basic knowledge of overall network/systems security

  

**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Senior Principal - Business Consulting
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* Infosys Consulting is looking for talented and highly motivated consultants to join our Life Sciences consulting practice
* As a Senior Principal you will work on strategic programs in the Life Sciences risk and compliance advisory areas helping pharma biopharma and medical devices companies develop strategic business capabilities while further deepening your knowledge in this area

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Lead Pre Sales and Sales activities including Proposal Development Solution and Value Proposition in collaboration with larger Infosys teams lead proposal development process solution formulation proposal pricing client presentation contract negotiations and deal closure
* Engage and maintain contacts with key client stakeholders proactively identify opportunities for business development and lead workstreams to aid development of new business opportunities
* Provide leadership in critical engagements and drive successful outcomes and have ability to pursue and grow deep client relationships
* Be a subject matter expert in areas such as Risk Management Quality Management Document Management and Compliance Management
* Understands how key risks and controls have an impact on the business from a pharma business operational and or system perspective
* Demonstrate a clear understanding of the risks and opportunities related to standard operating procedures and the governance policy framework
* Makes recommendations for risk mitigation and audit strategies based on accurate identification of potential market business pharmaceutical operational IT and talent risks
* Experienced with planning and conducting functional and domain specific risk assessment of Pharma and Medical Device programs projects
* Experienced in using industry wide risk management tools and to perform root cause analysis on trends and address deviations via preventive detective and corrective measures
* Experience of working with Risk Management Security and Compliance Policy frameworks ISEC Compliance Records Management
* Applies an understanding of company short term and long term strategic objectives and the risks that apply
* Is knowledgeable about market and regulatory frameworks and trends that have the potential for substantive impact on organization strategies policies or risks
* Knowledge and hands on experience conducting periodic or control assessment audits and risk assessments
* Knowledge of various validation tools and templates used throughout the Pharma and Medical Device industry
* Participate in analyst meetings industry speaking engagements publish white papers view points in leading industry journals
* Participate in practice development activities coach consultants participate in consultant training and staffing processes
* AI Risk Assurance

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* Demonstrates proven success in roles and thorough abilities in one or more of the following areas
* Minimum of 18 years of professional experience in Life Sciences industry working for a consulting services organization and or industry experience
* Preferable IT background to understand larger impact of business organization mission and strategies architecture technical complexities on the program
* Experienced in leading strategic and tactical discussions with Senior stakeholders
* MBA MS or any other advanced degree is preferred

  

**Additional Responsibilities:**
--------------------------------

  

* Successful track record using industry leading tools and techniques to conduct risk assessments and compliance checks to build digital solutions in a multi disciplinary multi vendor corporate setting and to validate assets
* Experienced in leading strategic and tactical discussions with CxO level
* Industry experiences working directly at pharmaceutical medical devices or pharma distributor organization is a plus

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Technology\-\>Life Sciences\-\>Regulatory Systems,Technology\-\>Life Sciences\-\>Safety Systems

description:
Job requisition ID :: 108592
Date: Jul 16, 2026
Location: Gurugram
Designation: Consultant
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Consultant \| ReactJS \| Gurugram \| Engineering \| Platform Development \& Integration**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 108592
* **Location**: Gurugram
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP

**The team**

  



Deloitte’s Technology \& Transformation practice can help you uncover and unlock the value buried deep inside vast amounts of data. Our global network provides strategic guidance and implementation services to help companies manage data from disparate sources and convert it into accurate, actionable information that can support fact\-driven decision\-making and generate an insight\-driven advantage. Our practice addresses the continuum of opportunities in business intelligence \& visualization, data management, performance management and next\-generation analytics and technologies, including big data, cloud, cognitive and machine learning.  



**Your work profile**



We are looking for a React.js Developer with a strong foundation in software engineering principles, not just React development. The ideal candidate should be capable of building scalable, maintainable, and modular frontend applications.  



**Key skills required:**


**React.js (Intermediate)**
* Strong understanding of React fundamentals
* Functional components and Hooks
* State management (Context API, Redux, or similar)
* Component lifecycle and rendering behavior
* Performance optimization (memoization, lazy loading, code splitting)
* Routing using React Router
* API integration and asynchronous data handling
* Form handling and validation
* Error boundaries and React best practices
* Reusable component development
* Strong knowledge of CSS
* Responsive design

  


**JavaScript \& TypeScript**
* Strong knowledge of modern JavaScript (ES6\+)
* Closures, promises, async/await, event loop
* Modules and imports/exports
* TypeScript fundamentals (preferred)

  


**Software Engineering Fundamentals**
* The candidate should have practical knowledge of:

  


**SOLID Principles**
* Single Responsibility Principle
* Open/Closed Principle
* Liskov Substitution Principle
* Interface Segregation Principle
* Dependency Inversion Principle

  


**Clean Architecture**
* Separation of concerns
* Layered architecture
* Business logic independent of UI
* Maintainable and testable code structure
* Clear understanding of presentation, domain, and data layers

  


**Design Patterns**
* Factory Pattern
* Singleton Pattern
* Strategy Pattern
* Adapter Pattern
* Observer Pattern
* Dependency Injection concepts
* Ability to identify when and where design patterns should be applied

  


**Modular Architecture**
* Feature\-based folder structure
* Modular and reusable code organization
* Shared utilities and common components
* Low coupling and high cohesion
* Scalable project architecture

  


**Preferred Qualifications**



 B.E / B.Tech / BCA/ MCA in Computer Science, Engineering or a related subject

  


**Location and Way of Working:**

  


* Base location: Gurgaon
* Way of working: Hybrid

description:
Job Description \#body.unify div.unify\-button\-container .unify\-apply\-now: focus, \#body.unify div.unify\-button\-container .unify\-apply\-\#body.unify div.unify\-button\-container .unify\-apply\-now: focus, \#body.unify div.unify\-button\-container .unify\-apply\-
  
**Job Title:** ASSET AND CONFIGURATION COORDINATOR L1(CONTRACT)
  
**City:** Bengaluru
  
**State/Province:** Karnataka
  
**Posting Start Date:** 7/16/26
  
**Wipro Limited (NYSE:** WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future\-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our customers, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever\-changing world. For additional information, visit us at www.wipro.com.
  
  

**Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

The Configuration co\-ordinator is focused on managing and maintaining the Configuration Management System and the Configuration Management Database (CMDB).
  
The Configuration Management co\-ordinator watches over the integrity of the CMDB and associated libraries. As an assistant to the Configuration Management Process Manager they report directly to him.
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
The roles and responsibilities defined below indicate the co\-ordinator as well as the configuration managers roles, rolled into one.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ The Configuration Manager is responsible for maintaining information about Configuration Items required in delivering IT services.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Maintains a logical model, containing the components of the IT infrastructure (CIs) and their associations.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Ensuring that all CIÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂs are accurately registered
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Interfacing with other support organizations to ensure the effective use of the CMDB and Configuration Management System
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Maintaining and recommending improvements to facilitate effective use and integrity of the CMDB
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Creating reports and analyses the CMDB when requested by the Configuration Manager
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Ensuring that CI Owners maintain adequate Configuration Management process disciplines and systems for the CIs they own
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Ensuring that authorized procedures and work practices are followed
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Own the SACM process end to end
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Make sure all changes to the CIs and the CMS are controlled, audited and reported
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Make sure the CMS is up\-to\-date
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Define the naming conventions for the CIs
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Own the CMS
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ All updates to the CMS go through the Configuration Manager
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Take control of both the software and hardware CIs
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Control of all assets and liaison with the procurement team is one of the key responsibilities
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Define the asset disposal policy along with the customer
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Work closely with the change and release team to make sure the CMS is up\-to\-date
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Conduct scheduled and also ad hoc audits of the CIs
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Define an audit policy and audit process covering local as well as remote CIs
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Handle discrepancies resulting out of the audits
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Maintain libraries or other storage areas to hold CIs
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Safeguard the integrity of the logic of the CMDB and associated libraries
  
  

͏
  
  

ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Configuration Librarian in particular will be responsible for the following activities
  
  

Supervise and control receipt, identification, storage and withdrawal of all supported CIs
  
Supervise the functional design and support of the CMDB and associated libraries
  
Assist in the identification of products and CIs
  
Maintain and provide information on the status of CIs
  
Number, record, store and distribute Configuration Management issues
  
Record the receipt of authorized new or revised configurations and archive superseded configurations to the appropriate library
  
Hold master copies of documents, software, etc.
  
Notify holders of any changes to their products or CIs
  
Assist in conducting audits
  
͏
  
  

KEY SKILLS AND COMPETENCIES
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Good analytic and decision\-making skills.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Good communication skills.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Good presentation skills.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Must have conflict resolution abilities.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Technical background with demonstrated skills in at least one or multiple IT technologies / disciplines
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ IT hardware and Software setup, management and troubleshooting capabilities
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Configuration Management experience on document control, source code management, and Defect Management tools
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Should be able to create a CMDB repository
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Should have understanding of the software development lifecycle
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Experience of working in a multi\-site environment
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Extensive experience with SCM tools and with build automation software
  
  

͏
  
**Mandatory Skills:** ITIL \- IT Hardware Asset Management .

title: Golang Backend Developer
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


**Job Description**
-------------------


**Job Title:** Golang Backend Developer (Software Engineer)


**Location:** Bangalore, Karnataka, India


**Job Overview:**


The Golang Backend Developer will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend services ecosystem. This role involves working closely with frontend teams, architects, and infrastructure teams to deliver robust, cloud\-native applications. The engineer will focus on building high\-performance APIs and microservices using Golang, ensuring system reliability, scalability, and security.


**Basic Qualifications:**


* 4 years of relevant software development experience
* Strong backend development experience using Golang
* Minimum 2–3 years of experience building and deploying cloud\-native applications

**Essential Job Functions/Responsibilities:**


* Design, develop, test, deploy, and maintain backend services using Golang
* Build scalable and high\-performance RESTful APIs and microservices
* Design and optimize data storage solutions using SQL databases
* Collaborate with frontend developers to integrate user\-facing elements with server\-side logic
* Follow Agile/Scrum practices including sprint planning, stand\-ups, and retrospectives
* Analyze complex problems and propose efficient backend solutions
* Ensure code quality through best practices, unit testing, and code reviews
* Take ownership of features/modules and deliver high\-quality outcomes
* Work with DevOps teams for CI/CD, deployment, and monitoring

**Technical Expertise:**


* 5\+ years of experience in backend development with Golang
* Strong understanding of microservices architecture and distributed systems
* Experience designing and developing REST APIs and event\-driven services
* Hands\-on experience with SQL databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.)
* Familiarity with NoSQL databases (e.g., Cassandra, DynamoDB, Elasticsearch) is a plus
* Experience with Docker and Kubernetes for containerized deployments
* Experience working with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Knowledge of message queues/streaming systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.)
* Familiarity with OAuth 2\.0, JWT, and secure API design
* Experience with Git or similar version control systems

**Desired Skills:**


* Experience in building high\-throughput, low\-latency systems
* Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools such as Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana
* Understanding of caching strategies using Redis or Memcached
* Exposure to system design and scalability best practices
* Experience working in large\-scale distributed environments
**Job Description \- Grade Specific**
-------------------------------------

The GCC Operations Manager will lead end\-to\-end Global Command Center operations driving 24x7 service availability, major incident management, AIOps adoption, and operational excellence across InfraOps, EventOps, and ITSM.  

This role is accountable for stability, resilience, automation\-led operations, and continuous service improvement in a complex global enterprise environment.

Ensure delivery against SLAs, OLAs, and KPIs (MTTR, MTTD, availability)  

Drive integrated operations across global teams and towers  

2\. Major Incident \& Crisis Management

Ensure adherence to ITIL processes (Incident, Change, Problem)  

Participate in governance reviews, audits, and service performance reviews
  

5\. Stakeholder \& Client Engagement  

Act as the single point of accountability for GCC operations  

Interface with client leadership, business stakeholders, and vendors  

Manage escalations and ensure high customer satisfaction  

  

7\. Continuous Service Improvement  

Drive problem management, RCA quality, and incident reduction initiatives  

Identify opportunities for automation, optimization, and cost efficiency  

Improve operational KPIs and productivity metrics
  

8\. Team Leadership \& Capability Development  

Lead multi\-location teams (India, Malaysia, Philippines, US)  

Build high\-performing teams with strong MIM and operational skills  

Coach teams on ITIL processes, crisis handling, and AIOps adoption  

Required Skills \& Competencies  

Strong expertise in Major Incident Management \& Command Center operations  

Deep understanding of ITIL (Incident, Change, Problem Management)  

Experience in global delivery models and 24x7 operations  

Strong stakeholder communication and executive presence  

Ability to lead under pressure and drive decisions in critical situations  

  

Professional \& Technical Skills:
  

Technical Expertise  

Tools: ServiceNow, Splunk, AIOps platforms, monitoring \& alerting tools  

Technologies:
  

o Infrastructure (Linux, Windows, Cloud, Storage, Network)  

o Middleware, Databases,
  

Exposure to automation tools and AI\-driven operations
  

Bangalore (24x7 Global Delivery Model)  

  

Additional Information:
  

* The candidate should have minimum 7\.5 years of experience in Infrastructure Service Management.


10–15\+ years in IT Operations / GCC / NOC / Command Center roles  

5\+ years in leadership or operations management role  

ITIL certification (Foundation / Intermediate) preferred  

Bachelor s degree in IT/Engineering or equivalent experience
  

15 years full time education

Strong hands‑on experience architecting and designing solutions on AWS

The AWS Mid‑Market Sales Engineer is a client‑facing technical leader who partners with sales teams to drive cloud transformation for mid‑market clients. Acting as a trusted advisor, the role bridges business objectives and AWS technology, designing scalable, secure, and value‑driven solutions that deliver measurable outcomes and long‑term growth.
  
This is a strategic pre‑sales and solutioning role, focused on shaping cloud journeys, demonstrating the art of the possible, and ensuring a smooth transition from sales to delivery.

Role involves close collaboration with clients, sales, and delivery teams across India and global markets

title: Test Automation, AI & Medical Devices
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Your Role**
-------------


As a **Technical Solution Leader – Test Automation, AI \& Medical Devices**, you will lead client\-facing solutioning, technical architecture, presales activities, and AI\-driven test engineering transformation initiatives for Medical Devices and Life Sciences clients. You will collaborate with account teams, delivery leaders, quality engineers, regulatory SMEs, and AI specialists to define scalable automation strategies and innovative validation solutions.


In this role, you will:


* Lead solutioning for Medical Device Verification \& Validation (V\&V), Software Testing, Test Automation, Quality Engineering, and Sustaining Engineering engagements.
* Support RFPs, RFIs, proposals, technical presentations, estimations, delivery models, and staffing plans.
* Translate customer testing challenges into automation roadmaps, target architectures, and measurable business outcomes.
* Define automation strategies across UI, API, Integration, Data, Regression, Performance, and Continuous Testing.
* Guide framework selection, CI/CD integration, test data management, reporting, and automation feasibility assessments.
* Collaborate with AI teams to develop POCs, accelerators, and roadmaps leveraging LLMs, RAG, AI Agents, and intelligent automation.

**Your Profile**
----------------


### **Experience**


* 12–18 years of experience in Test Automation, Quality Engineering, Verification \& Validation, or Medical Device Engineering.
* Strong understanding of test automation frameworks, architecture, and quality engineering practices.
* Experience across UI, API, Integration, Data, Regression, Performance, and Continuous Testing.
* Hands\-on knowledge of CI/CD, DevOps practices, test data management, reporting, and automation strategy.
* Exposure to AI\-driven testing, GenAI, LLMs, RAG, AI Agents, and intelligent automation solutions.
* Ability to evaluate technical risks, tool selection, feasibility, infrastructure requirements, and delivery readiness.

### **Domain Expertise**


* Strong understanding of Medical Device product development and regulated engineering environments.
* Knowledge of Verification \& Validation, Quality Systems, Risk Management, Traceability, and Compliance.
* Familiarity with regulations and standards such as **IEC 62304, ISO 13485, FDA regulations, and CSV practices**.

**What You’ll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to shape AI\-enabled testing and validation solutions for leading Medical Device organizations.
* Exposure to cutting\-edge technologies including AI, GenAI, Digital Health, Automation, and Connected Products.
* Collaborative environment focused on innovation, continuous learning, and engineering excellence.
* Access to learning programs, certifications, and leadership development opportunities.

**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner with **420,000 team members across more than 50 countries**. The Group reported **2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion**.


Capgemini in India comprises nearly **235,000 team members** across 13 locations, delivering end\-to\-end services across strategy, technology, engineering, and operations.


**Make it real \|** **www.capgemini.com/in\-en**

title: Oracle SCM Transportation Management + Level (Associate Director)
description:
Job Title \- Oracle SCM Transportation Management \+ Level (Associate Director)
  
**Management Level :** 05 – Associate Director
  
**Location:** Any Accenture India Location
  
**Educational Qualification:** Minimum 20\+ years of relevant experience is required
  
  

**Job Summary:**  

We are seeking a senior, performance\-focused Global Supply Chain \& Delivery Leader to own and scale offshore delivery for complex, multi\-geography supply chain transformation programs. This is an executive\-level mandate for a leader who combines deep, product\-agnostic supply chain domain expertise with hands\-on delivery ownership across Oracle ERP, SCM Cloud, logistics platforms, and connected solutions ecosystems.
  
  

**Roles \& Responsibilities:**  

Delivery Leadership \& Organization Building
  
Build, scale, and lead multi\-disciplinary offshore delivery organizations (100\+ members) spanning Supply Chain, Logistics, connected solutions practices for the Accenture Edge/ Midmarket business
  
Own end\-to\-end delivery of complex, pan\-supply chain programs across Asia, Europe, and North America markets, ensuring on time, on\-budget, and on\-quality outcomes.
  
Strategically expand global implementation and sustenance footprints, strengthening the offshore delivery model for broad\-based consulting engagements.
  
Supply Chain \& Logistics Transformation
  
Formulate and implement comprehensive cross\-ERP and supply chain strategies.
  
Act as Delivery Lead for enterprise\-wide connected solutions, ERP, logistics and SCM transformational engagements for global clients.
  
Technology, Platforms \& Innovation
  
Lead delivery across Oracle SCM Cloud, Oracle Transportation Management (OTM), and a broad ecosystem of logistics execution platforms including Blue Yonder, Manhattan, SwissLog, eBizNET and NetSuite.
  
Champion AI\-driven initiatives across Oracle logistics platform delivery to modernize supply chain execution and enable connected, autonomous operations.
  
Drive high\-impact, rapid deployment initiatives that enable cloud\-based supply chain agility for global accounts
  
Commercial, Governance \& Stakeholder Management
  
Drive governance rigour, utilisation optimisation, and margin\-focused delivery frameworks
  
Own key account management, pre\-sales, solutioning, and strategic partner and alliance relationships to fuel business expansion globally.
  
Cultivate strategic alliances with platform vendors, systems integrators, and specialist consulting partners to strengthen the delivery ecosystem.
  
  

**Professional \& Technical Skills:**  

25\+ years of progressive experience across manufacturing supply chains, product development, and transformational IT / supply chain consulting, with a substantial portion in senior delivery leadership.
  
Proven track record of building and scaling offshore delivery organizations and orchestrating complex, multi\-geo transformation programs across Asia, Europe, and North America.
  
Extensive pure\-play, product\-agnostic consulting expertise formulating and implementing cross\-ERP and supply chain strategies end\-to\-end.
  
Deep, hands\-on delivery expertise with Oracle SCM Cloud and Oracle Transportation Management (OTM), including large\-scale, phased, multi\-country rollouts.
  
Versatile logistics technology experience across Oracle, Red Prairie / Blue Yonder, SwissLog, Manhattan, eBizNET, NetSuite, and comparable WMS / TMS platforms.
  
Experience leading product strategy and supply chain execution product development is strongly preferred.
  
  

EDUCATION
  
Bachelor of Technology (or equivalent) from a premier institute.
  
Executive Program / Post\-Graduate qualification in Business Management from a top\-tier business – strongly preferred.
  
  

**Additional Information:**  

* None

title: GSA Solution Architect
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
  

Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth.
  
  

At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
  

About The Role
  
  

As a Deal Solution Architect , you will play a critical role in driving digital transformation for our clients in India. You will be responsible for architecting winning solutions for large and medium sized deals (USD 25 to 50 million) in both the private and public sectors. This role requires a deep understanding of various technologies, strong collaboration skills, and the ability to navigate complex RFP processes.
  
  

As a key member of the team, you will collaborate closely with technical experts, delivery partners, commercial teams, legal, finance, contract management teams, and customer stakeholders to develop compelling and competitive solutions. You will have the opportunity to influence strategic deal pursuits, optimize technical and commercial outcomes, and contribute to business growth while working in a dynamic and fast\-paced environment.
  
  

In This Role, You Will
  
  

Analyze RFPs and lead QandA sessions with customers alongside technical experts.
  
Develop compelling and competitive solutions that align with organizational guidelines and leverage best practices.
  
Collaborate effectively with multiple technical teams delivery partners commercial legal finance and contract management teams.
  
Manage solution versions integrate components from various technical towers and ensure a cohesive final response.
  
Optimize estimations technical solutions and project costs.
  
Own the final solution response and ensure its completeness.
  
Share effort and cost details with finance for commercial solution development.
  
Support the commercial team in deal negotiations and auctions.
  
Assist legal contract and delivery teams in drafting Statements of Work (SOWs).
  
Communicate deal summaries to leadership and present solutions to internal review boards.
  
Defend solutions with customers and manage risks associated with the solution development process.
  
Model SLA penalties and analyze commercial risks.
  
Design RACI matrices across internal teams partners and customers.
  
Report deal unit economics and benchmark against organizational guidelines.
  
Embrace our vibrant culture by striving for excellence, focusing on meaningful outcomes, and collaborating effectively. Take ownership, build relationships, and focus on personal growth to drive business strategy and foster an inclusive culture, creating unmatched career opportunities and impactful work.
  
  

What You Must Have To Be Considered
  
  

Proven experience in architecting solutions for large scale digital transformation projects.
  
Strong understanding of ERP implementations and other platform\-based solutions (e.g. SAP RISE Salesforce ServiceNow).
  
Experience with multi tower multi\-year IT outsourcing engagements.
  
Familiarity with hybrid cloud architectures ( VPC Network Connectivity DC DR Compute \& Storage types Security ) modern data architectures and observability concepts.
  
Understanding of API management cybersecurity principles and agile methodologies.
  
Knowledge of different commercial models (effort\-based task catalog outcome based etc.).
  
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  
Ability to work calmly under pressure and manage competing priorities.
  
Proficiency in Office 365 especially MS Excel.
  
Experience with Low\-Code No\-Code platforms.
  
Knowledge of bot\-based solutions and automation in software engineering or application support.
  
Familiarity with Generative AI and its application in automating daily work.
  
TOGAF
  
A strong sense of ownership, desire to create meaningful outcomes, and passion for work that serves a greater good for customers, communities, or global challenges.
  
**The embodiment of Cognizant’s Values of:** Work as One, Dare to Innovate, Raise the Bar, Do The Right Thing, \& Own It.
  
  

These Will Help You Succeed
  
  

Strong stakeholder management and collaboration skills across technical, commercial, and business teams.
  
Ability to manage complex deal pursuits with multiple workstreams and dependencies.
  
Strong analytical and problem\-solving capabilities.
  
Experience presenting solutions to leadership teams and governance boards.
  
Ability to balance technical, commercial, and contractual considerations while designing solutions.
  
Strong negotiation support and risk management capabilities.

title: TL-US Banking Check/Item Processing Implementation
description:
**Job title:** Team Lead – US Banking Check/ Item Processing Implementation
  
About the role
  
As a SME/Team Lead/Manager \- US Banking Check/ Item Processing Implementation,, you will make an impact by delivering implementation solutions across card and payments processing environments with a focus on US banking. You will be a valued member of the Cards \& Payments team and work collaboratively with clients, technical teams, and stakeholders to drive successful project outcomes and client satisfaction.
  
In this role, you will
  
* Lead and execute implementation activities across cards and payments solutions, ensuring alignment with client requirements and business objectives


Manage end\-to\-end implementation of item and image processing across merchant, mobile, teller, and ATM capture channels
  
Drive solutioning for Image Cash Letter processing, including duplicate detection configuration and exception handling
  
Collaborate with clients during US business hours to gather requirements, deliver training, and support go\-live and stabilization phases
  
Analyze data, identify risks or patterns, and proactively resolve issues while managing escalations and stakeholder communication
  
Work model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. Based on this role’s business requirements, this is a hybrid position requiring 2\-3 days a week in a client or Cognizant office in PUNE / BANGALORE / CHENNAI/HYD/Kolkata/Ahmedabad India. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting. This may change based on the project you’re engaged in, as well as business and client requirements. Rest assured; we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
What you need to have to be considered
  
* 5\-15 years of experience in US banking cards and payments domain


Strong knowledge of item and image processing, including merchant and mobile distributed capture workflows
  
Experience with Image Cash Letter processing and duplicate detection configuration and management
  
Understanding of deposit lifecycle, settlement, balancing, and exception handling across distributed capture platforms
  
Bachelor’s degree or equivalent qualification
  
These will help you stand out
  
* Familiarity with banking ERP, check clearing, and remittance processing environments


Knowledge of print and mail processing fundamentals, composition, and output tooling
  
Experience with file intake, data validation, and print floor or insertion processing capabilities
  
Basic knowledge of SQL and Oracle
  
Strong communication, stakeholder management, and client\-facing skills
  
Inclusive encouragement
  
We’re excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don’t hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.
