title: Senior Manager - Field Marketing
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
As a Senior Manager, Field Marketing within the Software Engineering Group (SEG), you will drive SEG's market presence through industry events, digital integrated campaigns, and ABM campaign coordination. Working in close partnership with Cognizant's ISL Field Marketing function, your focus will be on Service Line\-led event execution, end\-to\-end digital campaign delivery, and connecting SEG's content and subject matter experts into the broader field marketing engine.
  
You will bring together event management expertise and integrated digital campaign capability — spanning content, email, social, webinars, and roundtables — while coordinating closely with regional field marketing teams across EMEA, APJ, and Business Units to insert SEG into existing programmes rather than building parallel pipelines. This role carries a dotted\-line reporting relationship into the S. Director, Field, Service Line Marketing for field marketing activities, and works in coordination with the Director, Portfolio Marketing, SEG.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Own Cognizant, industry, and partner event execution — including Service Line\-led and funded engagements such as industry conferences, partner summits, and association events where SEG clients are present.
  
Map the full face\-to\-face event universe for SEG's target buyers and build an annual event calendar with clear business development objectives for each activation.
  
Curate target attendee lists for events in alignment with Service Line strategy, and manage all event logistics including agency coordination, venue, invitations, speaker preparation, on\-site coordination, and post\-event follow\-up sequences in Winzone.
  
Connect SEG into regional field marketing teams across EMEA, APJ, and BUs — identifying where SEG content and SMEs can be integrated into existing programmes.
  
Identify and facilitate SEG SME participation in external events, coordinating speaker briefing and talking\-point preparation with the Associate Director.
  
Manage partner co\-marketing event activations with AWS, Azure, and AI platform partners, tracking joint event pipeline and MDF utilization.
  
Plan and execute digital integrated campaigns end\-to\-end — spanning thought leadership, content, email, social, webinars, and roundtables.
  
Operationalize the ABM account strategy set by the Portfolio \& Content AD — briefing the central Cognizant campaign team on account priorities, messaging angles, and content requirements, while tracking execution against plan.
  
Coordinate with the GTM AD on post\-event lead capture and CRM entry in Winzone, and report on field marketing contribution to pipeline in weekly leadership reviews.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
10–14 years of B2B field marketing, event marketing, or integrated campaign management experience within IT services or technology consulting.
  
MBA (Marketing) preferred.
  
Proven experience planning and executing B2B events at scale — from industry conferences to Service Line\-led roundtables and partner activations.
  
Hands\-on experience running digital integrated campaigns including email, content, social, and webinars in a B2B technology environment.
  
Comfortable working within a matrixed field marketing structure — experience integrating into centralized or regional field marketing functions is essential.
  
Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple simultaneous events and campaign workstreams across geographies and time zones.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Experience running ABM programmes or briefing central campaign teams on account\-level priorities.
  
Familiarity with hyper scaler partner co\-marketing ecosystems including AWS, Azure, and GCP events and MDF programmes.
  
Prior exposure to BFSI, HCLS, P\&R, or CMT vertical marketing.
  
Ability to self\-start, manage competing priorities, and thrive in a fast\-paced, cross\-functional environment.
  
**Event Impact:** Successful execution of Service Line\-led events with measurable business development outcomes and pipeline contribution.
  
**Campaign Performance:** Effective delivery of integrated digital campaigns that drive awareness, engagement, and qualified leads.
  
**Regional Integration:** Seamless insertion of SEG content and SMEs into existing EMEA, APJ, and BU field marketing programmes.
  
**Partner Activation:** Strong co\-marketing execution with strategic hyper scaler partners resulting in joint pipeline and MDF utilization.
  
**ABM Execution:** Accurate and timely briefing of central campaign teams, with clear tracking of account\-level programme performance.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. This is a hybrid role based in Bangalore, with a dotted\-line reporting relationship into the S. Director, Field, Service Line Marketing for field marketing activities. The role requires flexibility to coordinate across US, UK, and India time zones. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting and may change based on business and client requirements. Rest assured, we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: .Net Angular
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Your Role**
-------------


As a **.NET Developer**, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and enhancing scalable applications using .NET technologies and Angular\-based frontend solutions. You will work closely with cross\-functional teams to deliver high\-quality, robust, and cloud\-enabled applications aligned with business needs and agile practices.


In this role, you will:


* Develop and maintain **full stack applications** using **C\# (.NET Core/.NET 5\+)** and **Angular / MVC** for frontend solutions.
* Design and implement **RESTful APIs** with proper security, monitoring, and documentation using **OpenAPI/Swagger**.
* Build and optimize **database solutions** using **SQL Server** and efficient query design.
* Contribute to **microservices\-based architecture** for scalable and modular application design.
* Integrate and deploy applications on **Azure cloud services**.
* Manage version control and collaboration using **GitHub and TFS**.
* Work within **SAFe/Agile frameworks** to deliver features aligned with program increment (PI) objectives.

**Your Profile**
----------------


### **Experience**


* **4\+ years of experience** in full stack .NET development.
* **Location**: **Bangalore** (Work from office in hybrid mode).
* Strong backend expertise in **C\# (.NET Core / .NET 5\+)**.
* Good hands\-on experience with **Angular (latest versions preferred)** and MVC\-based frontend development.
* Experience in building and consuming **RESTful APIs** with security and monitoring capabilities.
* Strong knowledge of **SQL and SQL Server**.
* Exposure to **microservices architecture** (preferred).
* Familiarity with **Azure (preferred) or AWS cloud platforms**.
* Experience with **GitHub, TFS**, and version control best practices.
* Exposure to **CI/CD pipelines** using tools such as Jenkins or Azure DevOps (good to have).
* Experience with **unit testing (xUnit/NUnit)** and integration testing (good to have).
* Knowledge of **SAFe methodology** is an advantage.
**What You’ll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to work on modern **cloud\-enabled full stack applications**.
* Exposure to **Angular, .NET, and Azure\-based enterprise systems**.
* Collaborative Agile work environment with continuous learning and growth.
* Access to upskilling opportunities in **cloud, microservices, and DevOps practices**.

**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI‑powered global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations realize their future through technology, data, and people. With nearly **60 years of heritage**, Capgemini is a responsible and diverse organization with **420,000 team members across more than 50 countries**. The Group reported **global revenues of €22\.1 billion in 2024**.


Capgemini in India comprises nearly **235,000 team members** working across **13 locations**, including Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Noida, Gurugram, and more. We deliver end‑to‑end services across **strategy, technology, engineering, and operations**.


**Make it real \|** **www.capgemini.com/in****‑en**

title: Senior Team Lead | Engineering, AI & Data - Engineering | Linux Admin
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108138
Date: Jul 16, 2026
Location: Bengaluru
Designation: Senior Consultant
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Senior Team Lead \| Engineering, AI \& Data \- Engineering \| Linux Admin**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 108138
* **Location**: Bengaluru
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP

**Senior Team Lead \| Engineering, AI \& Data \- Engineering \| Linux Admin**

  


**Location: Bangalore**

  


**The team**



Engineering helps Reimagine and re\-engineer mission\-critical operations and processes; Leverage engineering\-led design, deep industry knowledge, and AI and data\-driven insights to transform the technology platforms at the heart of business.


Working alongside team, we empower and drive mission\-critical solutions whether we need to modernize existing systems or implement new technology products and platforms. Through innovation, we improve financial performance, accelerate new digital businesses and fuel growth. Learn more about Engineering, AI and Data

  


**Your work profile**


* Ensure 24/7 availability of SAP systems within the SAP ECS environment, responding promptly to alerts and incidents in the Linux OS and infrastructure layers across Hyperscalar and SAP Data Centres.
* Act as the L3/L4 escalation contact for critical production issues, strictly adhering to change management protocols during service request execution.
* Optimize standard operating procedures by leveraging automation techniques and implementing automation solutions to enhance platform operations, efficiency, and reliability.
* Lead continuous improvement initiatives to enhance cloud services for SAP Applications, emphasizing scalability, security, and performance.
* Collaborate with a diverse, multinational team to deliver world\-class cloud services tailored to SAP Applications for global enterprise customers.
* Contribute to designing and implementing strategies to optimize the customer experience and ensure compliance with service level agreements (SLAs).

  


**Key skills required**


* Education : Any Bachelor’s or Master’s degree
* 8 \-12 years of experience in administering Linux operating systems (Redhat / SUSE) at an advanced level, with a strong grasp of troubleshooting and resolving complex issues.
* Proficiency in networking encompassing TCP/IP, IP routing, NAT, and firewalls.
* Demonstrated expertise in managing network services such as DNS, LDAP, and HTTP proxies.
* Hands\-on experience in administering hyperscalar environments which includes managing compute and storage.
* Hands\-on experience in administering hyperscalar network infrastructure, including VPCs, subnets, route tables, security groups, NSGs and NAT gateways.
* Hands\-on experience in administering and managing Containers and Kubernetes Cluster.
* Hands\-on experience in tools like Nagios, Prometheus Service now.
* Strong comprehension of IT security practices, particularly in OS hardening techniques.
* Proven track record in scripting languages ( PowerShell, Linux Shell, Perl, Python, Go, .) and adeptness with server automation tools like Ansible.

title: Data Architect
description:
**Project Role :** Data Architect  

**Project Role Description :** Define the data requirements and structure for the application. Model and design the application data structure, storage and integration.
  

**Must have skills :** Data Architecture Principles  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **15** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary:
  

As a Data Technology Delivery \& Solution Architect, you will lead the solutioning, architecture, and delivery of Data \& AI transformation programs. The role combines deep expertise in modern data platforms with strong client\-facing consulting, delivery leadership, and solution architecture capabilities. You will help clients build scalable, cloud\-native data ecosystems leveraging technologies such as Databricks, Snowflake, Azure, AWS, and Microsoft Data \& AI platforms.  

  

Roles \& Responsibilities:
  

Lead architecture, solution design, and delivery of data and analytics programs.  

Define modern data platform strategies across cloud and hybrid environments.  

Partner with clients and stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable technology solutions.  

Drive solution workshops, architecture reviews, and technology roadmaps.  

Lead delivery teams across architecture, data engineering, and analytics streams.  

Support proposals, solutioning, estimation, and business development activities.  

Ensure alignment with governance, security, scalability, and operational standards.  

  

Professional \& Technical Skills:
  

Strong experience in Data Architecture, Modern Data Platforms, and Cloud Technologies.  

Experience architecting and delivering AI/GenAI\-enabled data solutions, including data foundations for machine learning, analytics, and GenAI use cases.  

Hands\-on expertise with Databricks, Snowflake, Azure and/or AWS Data platforms.  

Experience designing Data Lakes, Lakehouse, Data Warehouse, and Enterprise Data Platforms.  

Strong understanding of data engineering, integration, governance, and analytics architectures.  

Experience leading client\-facing technology transformation programs.  

Excellent stakeholder management, consulting, and communication skills.  

  

Preferred  

Experience with Microsoft Fabric, Power BI, MLOps, and advanced AI platforms.  

Cross\-industry experience delivering Data \& AI programs.  

Experience in the India market / India domestic business landscape.  

Relevant certifications in Databricks, Snowflake, Azure, AWS, Data Architecture, or AI.  

  

Additional Information:
  

Minimum 15\+ years of experience in Data, Analytics, and Cloud technologies.  

Proven experience across solution architecture, delivery leadership, and client engagement.  

Location: Pune/ Mumbai  

15 years of full\-time education required.

title: CXO - End User Support - Associate Services Specialist I - Chennai
description:
**CXO – End User Support**
A person having high aspirations and passion to provide Technology support to accomplish their vision in Deloitte. CXO is the vital point of contact for all IT related incidents and service requests. Ability to demonstrate and communicate effectively with a wide variety of people in a dynamic, fast\-paced environment, which provides services in a professional manner, through email, phone, in person (Walk\-in Customers). You need to be a highly motivated team player with the skills and ability to manage ambiguity.
**Work you’ll do**


§ Deliver world\-class customer service to every customer visiting the CXO Walk\-Up.
§ Provide hardware and application support, including asset management and tracking for firm hardware and software, in alignment with established processes.
§ Install, image, and configure firm\-standard builds on laptops and desktops (Windows), as well as Macs and Chromebooks.
§ Serve as a point of contact for external customers and vendors, as needed.
§ Execute manager\-directed technology initiatives, including implementing new tools and capabilities under the direction of immediate supervisors.
§ Provide 24/7 support in accordance with CXO service level agreements (SLAs).
§ Deploy and support mobile devices, including user guidance and recommendations, activations, account changes, configuration, testing, troubleshooting, and issue resolution.
§ Build strong relationships with business users at all levels by promoting CXO services, understanding business needs, owing up issues through resolution, and sharing relevant technology updates.
§ Follow and reinforce standard processes and controls by documenting issues and resolutions in knowledge bases, and service desk tickets; meeting service level targets (SLTs) through accurate service/asset records, data retention, and PC compliance activities; and performing password resets.
§ Support and train users on audio/visual (A/V) and conferencing technology, including projectors and video conferencing systems, with daily checks and event start\-up support (including television/cable systems where applicable).
§ Provide onsite “hands and feet” support for infrastructure teams (LAN, WAN, and telephony) when local support is required.
§ Stay current on emerging and upcoming technologies, proactively evaluating their relevance and potential impact.


§ Assess existing processes end\-to\-end to identify gaps, inefficiencies, and opportunities for continuous improvement.


§ Apply innovative, solution\-oriented thinking to redesign workflows and propose practical, scalable enhancements that improve outcomes and customer experience.


**The team**


CXO team is proud to be part of Deloitte’s Technology Services spread across Hyderabad, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Delhi, Pune, Kolkata and Chennai. This team is responsible for accomplishing various Technology support tasks at the CXO walk\-up to deliver world class technology support. This team takes care of new hire laptop setup, End of Lease activity, PDA support, Printer support \& VC support at local offices.
**Qualifications**
------------------


**Required:**
* B. Tech, BE \& Engineering Graduates


* Technical troubleshooting, Strong Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, Power Point, Teams), Zoom, Windows and MAC operating systems, mobile device hardware and software, networking, video conferencing, Audio/Video, Telephony equipment, Active Directory administration will be an advantage.


**Preferred:**
* ITIL – Certification
* Microsoft MCSE, A\+, CCNA – Preferable

  

  

* A / N\+ Certification a plus
* Industry certifications such as Dell or HP a plus
* Basic knowledge of overall network/systems security

  

**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: LIMS Architect
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Your Role**
-------------


As a **LIMS Architect**, you will be responsible for leading Laboratory Information Management System (LIMS) transformation initiatives across Life Sciences organizations. You will drive LIMS assessments, solution design, integrations, implementations, validations, and modernization programs while ensuring compliance with pharmaceutical regulations and industry standards.


In this role, you will:


* Lead **LIMS implementation, integration, validation, and modernization** initiatives for Life Sciences clients.
* Conduct **pharma LIMS assessments**, application portfolio analysis, and application rationalization activities.
* Design end\-to\-end laboratory solutions covering **Pharma R\&D, Labs, CMC, Quality, Regulatory, and TechOps** functions.
* Evaluate vendor platforms and recommend optimal LIMS solutions based on business and technical requirements.
* Lead data migration, instrument integration, and enterprise integration initiatives across laboratory ecosystems.

**Your Profile**
----------------


### **Experience**


* **12–15 years of experience** in Life Sciences and LIMS solutions
* Strong experience with leading LIMS platforms:
* + **LabWare**
	+ **LabVantage**
	+ **STARLIMS**
* Hands\-on experience in:
	+ Sample Management
	+ Data Migration
* Experience in solution architecture, estimation, workshops, and stakeholder management.
* Strong understanding of AMS transition planning, support models, and operational excellence frameworks.

### **Domain Knowledge**


* Strong expertise across:
	+ Pharma R\&D
	+ Laboratory Operations
	+ CMC (Chemistry, Manufacturing \& Controls)

### **Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in:
	+ Engineering, Pharmacy ,Biotechnology
* Experience in **global delivery models**.
* Knowledge of **Agile/SAFe methodologies**.
* Exposure to **Cloud Platforms**, **AI**, and **Data \& Analytics** solutions.
* Relevant **LIMS platform certifications**.

**What You’ll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to lead large\-scale **Life Sciences digital transformation initiatives**.
* Exposure to leading LIMS platforms, pharmaceutical processes, and emerging technologies.
* Access to training and certification opportunities across cloud, data, AI, and Life Sciences technologies.

**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations realize their future through technology, data, and people. With nearly 60 years of heritage, Capgemini is a responsible and diverse organization with **420,000 team members across more than 50 countries**. The Group reported **2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion**.


Capgemini in India comprises nearly **235,000 team members** working across 13 locations: Bengaluru, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.


**Make it real \|** **www.capgemini.com/in\-en**

title: GEN AI Developer
description:
**Your Role**
-------------


As a GenAI Architect, you will be responsible for defining scalable GenAI architectures, building reusable assets and accelerators, and collaborating with business and delivery teams to industrialize AI solutions across multiple domains and customer engagements.
**Your Profile**
----------------


**Mandatory Skills**
====================


* 12\+ years of experience in software architecture, AI/ML, or digital engineering with significant exposure to Generative AI solutions.
* Strong expertise in designing and implementing GenAI architectures and AI solution platforms.
* Hands\-on experience with Agentic AI frameworks and intelligent workflow orchestration.
* Strong understanding of Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures and implementation patterns.
* Experience with vector databases and LLM integration workflows.
* Expertise in integrating AI services into enterprise and embedded products.
* Strong experience in microservices architecture and distributed systems design.
* Proficiency in Python, Rust, or .NET development.
* Experience with API management, enterprise integration patterns, data flows, and compliance architectures.
* Expertise in cloud platforms including Azure and AWS.
* Strong hands\-on experience with orchestration frameworks such as:
	+ LangChain
	+ Semantic Kernel
	+ LlamaIndex
	+ Similar AI orchestration frameworks
* Experience implementing observability, monitoring, and governance for AI applications.
* Strong understanding of NLP and Large Language Models including:
	+ OpenAI
	+ Azure OpenAI
	+ Amazon Bedrock
	+ Claude
	+ Other Foundation Models

**Preferred Skills**
====================


* Experience with AI agents, multi\-agent systems, and autonomous workflows.
* Familiarity with model fine\-tuning, prompt engineering, and model evaluation techniques.
* Knowledge of MLOps, LLMOps, and AI lifecycle management.
* Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud\-native architectures.
* Exposure to Responsible AI, AI governance, and regulatory compliance frameworks.
* Experience working with enterprise AI transformation programs.

**Soft Skills**
===============


* Strong leadership and solution architecture capabilities.
* Excellent stakeholder management and customer\-facing skills.
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Ability to influence technical and business decision\-making.
* Proactive and innovation\-driven mindset.
* Strong collaboration skills across cross\-functional and global teams.
* Ability to work in fast\-paced, evolving technology environments.
**In this role, you will:**
---------------------------


* Architect scalable, secure, and modular Generative AI solutions across enterprise and embedded ecosystems.
* Design and develop reusable AI assets, accelerators, and proof\-of\-concepts (POCs) that can be industrialized for project deployments.
* Define technology roadmaps and identify emerging AI tools, frameworks, and platform capabilities.
* Collaborate closely with business, delivery, and engineering teams to translate business requirements into AI\-driven solutions.
* Design and implement Agentic AI architectures leveraging autonomous workflows and orchestration frameworks.
* Support prompt orchestration, model integration, fine\-tuning, observability, evaluation, and toolchain automation.
* Develop and optimize Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) solutions using vector databases and enterprise knowledge sources.
* Architect microservices\-based AI platforms and integrations across cloud and enterprise systems.
* Collaborate with data scientists and AI engineers to operationalize machine learning and Generative AI models.
* Establish governance, compliance, security, and monitoring frameworks for AI deployments.
* Drive innovation by evaluating emerging LLMs, foundation models, and AI service offerings.
**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

title: AWS Sales Engineering Lead (Manager) - Global Mid Market
description:
Job Title – AWS Mid Market Sales Engineer (Manager) – Global Mid Market
  
**Management Level:** 07 – Manager
  
**Location:** Bangalore/ Gurgaon/ Hyderabad
  
  

**Must have skills:**  

Strong hands‑on experience architecting and designing solutions on AWS
  
Ability to translate business requirements into scalable, secure, value‑driven cloud architectures
  
Client‑facing experience engaging both technical teams and senior business stakeholders
  
Experience leading technical discovery, solution design, and POCs
  
Strong communication, presentation, and technical storytelling skills
  
Experience supporting sales pursuits, proposals, and Statements of Work (SOWs)
  
  

**Good to have skills:**  

Consulting or pre‑sales experience in cloud transformation engagements
  
Exposure to GenAI / AI‑driven solutions, Data \& AI platforms, or Cloud Security on AWS
  
Understanding of cloud operating models, governance, and engineering best practices
  
AWS Professional or Specialty certifications
  
Experience working with global or distributed delivery teams
  
  

**Experience:**  

5–9 years of experience in client‑facing technology roles (Cloud Engineer, Solution Architect, Sales Engineer, Technology Consultant)
  
4\+ years of hands‑on experience architecting and delivering solutions on AWS
  
Proven experience across cloud modernization, data platforms, AI/ML, or digital transformation initiatives
  
**Educational Qualification:** Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field Or equivalent relevant professional experience
  
  

**Job Summary:**  

The AWS Mid‑Market Sales Engineer is a client‑facing technical leader who partners with sales teams to drive cloud transformation for mid‑market clients. Acting as a trusted advisor, the role bridges business objectives and AWS technology, designing scalable, secure, and value‑driven solutions that deliver measurable outcomes and long‑term growth.
  
This is a strategic pre‑sales and solutioning role, focused on shaping cloud journeys, demonstrating the art of the possible, and ensuring a smooth transition from sales to delivery.
  
  

**Roles \& Responsibilities:**  

Lead technical discovery sessions to understand client business goals and technical landscapes
  
Architect and design AWS solutions aligned to business outcomes, scalability, and ROI
  
Act as the technical authority during sales cycles, advising on feasibility, risks, and best practices
  
Drive technical workshops and proof‑of‑concepts demonstrating AWS capabilities
  
Collaborate with sales teams on proposals, estimates, and SOW development
  
Ensure alignment between solution intent and delivery execution during sales‑to‑delivery handover
  
Contribute to reusable solution assets, patterns, and best practices
  
  

**Professional \& Technical Skills:**  

AWS Architecture \& Engineering
  
Cloud Migration \& Modernization
  
Data \& Analytics, AI/ML, and GenAI solutions
  
Cloud Security \& Compliance
  
Technical solutioning and value articulation
  
Stakeholder management and executive communication
  
  

**Additional Information:**  

Role involves close collaboration with clients, sales, and delivery teams across India and global markets
  
Some in‑person interaction required for client meetings, collaboration, and community engagement
  
Strong focus on continuous learning, certifications, and career progression within Accenture Cloud First
  
Accenture is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to inclusion, diversity, and accessibility
  
  

About Our Company \| Accenture

title: Veeva Developer_Configurator
description:
**Your Role**


As a **Veeva Developer / Configurator**, you will play a key role in delivering business and technology transformation initiatives for leading Life Sciences and Pharmaceutical organizations. You will be responsible for leading Pharma AMS assessments, solutioning, proposal support, Veeva platform implementations, and delivery excellence initiatives across R\&D, Clinical, Quality, and Regulatory domains.


You will collaborate with business stakeholders, delivery teams, architects, and vendors to design compliant, scalable, and future\-ready solutions while supporting application modernization and transformation programs.


**In this role, you will:**


* Lead Veeva Vault and Veeva CRM implementation, configuration, enhancement, and support initiatives.


* Design and develop integrations between Veeva platforms and enterprise applications using APIs and integration frameworks.


* Conduct application portfolio assessments, application rationalization, and modernization analysis for Life Sciences organizations.


* Facilitate discovery workshops, requirement gathering sessions, and stakeholder discussions.


* Develop solution architectures, transformation roadmaps, and implementation strategies aligned to business objectives.


* Support AMS proposal activities including application inventory assessment, criticality mapping, effort estimation, and support model definition.


* Define transition plans, governance models, SLA/KPI frameworks, and operational excellence strategies for AMS engagements.


* Evaluate vendors, platforms, and technology solutions to recommend the most suitable approach.


* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure successful delivery while maintaining regulatory compliance.


* Provide release management support, deployment planning, and environment governance for Veeva platforms.


* Identify risks, dependencies, and mitigation strategies during assessments and transformation initiatives.


* Present recommendations, assessment findings, and solution approaches to senior business and technology stakeholders.


**Your Profile**


**Technical Expertise**


**Mandatory Skills**


* Veeva Vault SDK


* Veeva Vault Configuration and Administration


* Veeva CRM Configuration


* Veeva APIs and Integration Development


* Veeva Platform Implementation and Release Management


* Enterprise Application Integration


* Solution Design and Technical Architecture


* Estimation, Planning, and Delivery Leadership


* Application Portfolio Assessment and Rationalization


* AMS Solutioning and Proposal Support


**Domain Expertise**


Experience in one or more of the following Life Sciences domains:


* Pharma Research \& Development (R\&D)


**Regulatory \& Compliance Knowledge**


Strong understanding of:


* GxP Compliance


* GAMP5


* 21 CFR Part 11


**Preferred Skills**


* Experience working in global delivery environments.


* Knowledge of Agile, Scrum, and SAFe methodologies.


* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP.


* Exposure to AI, Data Analytics, and Digital Transformation initiatives within Life Sciences.


* Relevant Veeva certifications.


* Experience supporting large\-scale AMS and transformation programs.


**Core Skills**


* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.


* Ability to lead workshops, assessments, and solutioning discussions.


* Excellent analytical and problem\-solving capabilities.


* Strong consulting mindset with business and technology alignment.


* Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.


* Strong presentation and proposal development skills.


* Collaboration and leadership skills across global teams.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**


* Opportunity to work with leading global Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences organizations.


* Exposure to complex Veeva transformation, modernization, and AMS engagements.


* Collaborative and innovation\-driven work environment.


* Opportunities to develop expertise across Life Sciences domains and emerging technologies.


* Continuous learning, certification support, and professional growth opportunities.


* Work with diverse global teams delivering impactful business and technology solutions.


**About Capgemini in India**


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations realize their future through technology, data, and people. With nearly 60 years of heritage, Capgemini is a responsible and diverse organization with 420,000 team members across more than 50 countries. The Group reported global revenues of €22\.1 billion in 2024\.


Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations, including Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Noida, Gurugram, and more. We deliver end\-to\-end services across strategy, technology, engineering, and operations.

**Your work profile**


* Lead requirement\-gathering sessions, workshops, and discussions with stakeholders to understand business needs and identify AI\-driven solutions.
* Analyze existing business processes and recommend improvements using Generative AI, Machine Learning, and automation technologies.
* Design, develop, and implement Generative AI applications using Large Language Models (LLMs) and frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, and Semantic Kernel.

* Implement MLOps practices using tools such as MLflow, Kubeflow, Databricks, Docker, and Kubernetes.

* Mentor junior team members and provide technical guidance on AI, Machine Learning, and software engineering best practices.


**Work in Agile/Scrum environments to deliver high\-quality AI solutions aligned with business**  

**Key skills required**


* Strong proficiency in Python programming.
* Experience with Machine Learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Scikit\-learn.
* Hands\-on experience with Generative AI and LLM frameworks including LangChain, LlamaIndex, Semantic Kernel, or similar.
* Experience with RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and vector databases (Pinecone, Chroma, FAISS, Weaviate, etc.).
* Knowledge of NLP, deep learning, and transformer architectures.
* Experience with REST APIs, microservices, and software engineering best practices.
* Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Understanding of MLOps tools such as MLflow, Kubeflow, Databricks, Docker, and Kubernetes.
* Experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps practices.


**Preferred Skills**


* Experience with AI Agents and Agentic AI frameworks.
* Knowledge of multimodal AI solutions (text, image, audio, video).
* Exposure to AI governance, model monitoring, and responsible AI practices.

title: Cyber Exposure Management - Consultant, Cyber Engineering - HYD
description:
Join our innovative, creative, and inclusive Cyber team \- a world\-class operation with extensive knowledge, experience and opportunities for professional growth. You will collaborate with business and technical teams to bring about change and influence across the entire world of Deloitte. Apply your skills to make things happen and be a part of a great team that is passionate about serving a great purpose.


The Cyber Exposure Management (CEM) function sits within the wider Deloitte UK Cybersecurity organization. The CEM team serves as a central team providing an ongoing picture of the entire exposure landscape, offering deep risk context and a holistic and continuous view covering external, internal, cloud, and identity assets.


This role within Cyber Exposure Management, will play a pivotal role in the CEM team. This role is central to bridging the gap between security tooling outputs, asset owners, and leadership, by driving the continuous identification, assessment, and prioritisation of cyber exposures.


The successful candidate will be instrumental in supporting CEM processes, providing expert analysis, and fostering effective communication to ensure the organisation's cyber risk posture is understood and proactively managed. This role focuses on analysis, coordination, and reporting.

**Work you'll do**


As a Deputy Manager, Cyber Engineering on the Cyber Exposure Management team, you will be responsible for:

* Act as a deputy to the CEM Team Manager by supporting daily operations, strategic planning, and continuity of team activities
* Analyze cyber exposure data from vulnerability, configuration, cloud security, and other security tooling outputs to identify and prioritize risk
* Translate technical findings into risk\-prioritized insights, coordinate remediation timelines with asset owners, and validate exposure reduction after fixes are implemented
* Support the development, refinement, and implementation of CEM processes, reporting, dashboards, and metrics aligned to organizational objectives
* Facilitate communication across the CEM team, tooling teams, asset owners, and leadership while providing guidance and mentorship to junior team members

**The team**


At Deloitte, we’re all about collaboration. And nowhere is this more apparent than among our 2,000\-strong internal services team. With our combined specialist skills, we provide all the essential support and advice our client\-facing colleagues need, right across the firm. This enables them to focus all their efforts on delivering the best service possible to their clients. Covering seven distinct areas; Human Resources, Clients \& Industries, Finance \& Legal, Practice Support Services, Quality \& Risk Services, IT Services, and Workplace Services \& Real Estate, together we live, breathe and deliver the Deloitte experience.


The Cyber Exposure Management (CEM) function sits within the wider Deloitte UK Cybersecurity organization. The CEM team serves as a central team providing an ongoing picture of the entire exposure landscape, offering deep risk context and a holistic and continuous view covering external, internal, cloud, and identity assets.

**Location: Hyderabad**

**Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM**

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 5\-10 years of experience in information security or cybersecurity focused on cyber exposure management, attack surface management, cyber risk, or threat intelligence
* 2\+ years of experience in staff management, mentoring, and coaching
* Experience using Qualys, Prisma, CyCognito, and ServiceNow
* Experience using Microsoft Office Suite
* Knowledge of Key Risk Indicators (KRIs), Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs), and Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS)
* Knowledge of confidentiality, integrity, and availability principles
* Knowledge of cybersecurity frameworks including ISO 27000, Open Worldwide Application Security Project (OWASP), and National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)


Preferred:

* Experience with data analytics, root cause analysis, and security testing
* Experience preparing reports and dashboards on cyber exposure metrics
* Experience coordinating remediation activities with asset owners and leadership stakeholders
* Certifications such as ITIL, COBIT, Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP), Certified Information Security Manager (CISM), CompTIA CySA\+, or GIAC Security Essentials Certification (GSEC)

**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

-------------------


**Your Role**
-------------


As a **Pharma R\&D Functional SME**, you will be responsible for driving Pharma Application Management Services (AMS) assessments, solutioning, proposal development, and delivery excellence for global Life Sciences clients. You will leverage your deep domain expertise across Pharma R\&D, Laboratories, Clinical, Manufacturing, Quality, Regulatory, and Commercial functions to help organizations optimize application portfolios, modern

* Support proposal development, RFP/RFI responses, and client presentations.
* Define AMS operating models, transition approaches, SLA/KPI frameworks, and risk mitigation strategies

**Your Profile**
----------------

* **15–18 years of experience** in the Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences industry.

Strong understanding of Life Sciences processes across:


* Pharma R\&D
* Laboratory Operations
* Technical Operations (TechOps)

Hands\-on experience with Pharma and R\&D platforms including:


* Preclinical Systems
* Lab Informatics
* ELN (Electronic Lab Notebook)
* LIMS
* GeneData
* Benchling
* BIOVIA
* Revvity

### **AMS \& Solutioning Expertise**


* Application inventory assessment and portfolio analysis.
* Effort estimation and resource planning.
* SLA/KPI framework design and governance.
* Modernization recommendations and transformation roadmap development.
* Vendor evaluation and stakeholder management.

Strong understanding of:


* **GxP**
* **GAMP5**
* **21 CFR Part 11**
* **Annex 11**
* **Data Integrity**
* **Computer System Validation (CSV)**
* Validation Lifecycle Management

* Experience working in global delivery environments.
* Knowledge of Agile and SAFe methodologies.
* Exposure to Cloud Platforms, AI, Data \& Analytics solutions.
* Relevant industry or platform certifications.

**What You’ll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to work with leading global pharmaceutical and life sciences organizations.
* Exposure to cutting\-edge digital transformation initiatives across R\&D, Clinical, Manufacturing, and Quality functions.
* Collaborative, innovation\-driven culture focused on continuous learning and growth.
* Access to upskilling opportunities in Life Sciences, Cloud, Data, AI, and emerging technologies.

Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations realize their future through technology, data, and people. description:
Designs and develops computer programs and monitors the work of junior staff to ensure accuracy and efficiency; performs evaluation of packaged software; conducts system studies to analyze and evaluate manual and computerized processes to improve efficiency, develops techniques for automating processes as appropriate; conducts Rough Order of Magnitude for development of new applications and reviews work of others; determines the need for system security, backup/recovery, data conversion, plans and controls development, testing, and implementation of systems and manages technical activities; works with business and responds to Production Support issues as necessary.


Key Tasks for Position Level I: Codes instructions for computer programs/objects/components; configures packaged software; tests and implements all changes to ensure they meet specifications. Documents and implements programs according to installation standards and conventions.


Quality checks program code, related objects and documentation. Responds to Production Support issues. Works with business as required. Key Tasks for Position Level\-II, in Addition to the Above: Analyzes programs to ensure that they efficiently use computer and storage resources; recommends appropriate changes as necessary. Conducts preliminary estimates / Rough Order of Magnitude for the level of effort of new/change to application functionality. Analyzes and makes recommendations for the need for system backup, security, restart/recovery, balancing \& controls; recommends approaches for meeting such needs. Analyzes and documents the requirements and approaches to data conversion and data modeling. Key Tasks for Position Level\-III, in Addition to the Above: Conducts system studies, analyzes existing computerized and manual processes to improve efficiency; researches and develops techniques for automatation, as approved. Monitors the work of junior staff to ensure efficiency, and compliance with specification. Designs and develops documentation of proposed procedures and systems. Performs preliminary evaluation of packaged software. Manages and controls system development projects. Supports implementation/training activities; troubleshoots system environmental issues, as required. Key Tasks for Position Level\-IV, in Addition to the Above: Plans and controls development, testing, and implementation of systems; manages technical activities. Completes review of estimates / Rough Order of Magnitude for the level of effort/cost of new application functionality. Performs final evaluation of packaged software.

title: Cloud Architect
description:
**Your Role**
-------------


As a Cloud Architect, you will be responsible for designing and implementing cloud\-native solutions, establishing architectural guardrails, and enabling enterprise cloud transformation initiatives. You will work closely with product teams, platform engineers, and business stakeholders to deliver secure, scalable, and cost\-effective cloud architectures.
**In this role, you will:**
---------------------------


* Design, build, and maintain enterprise cloud infrastructure and cloud\-native solutions.
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams to develop innovative cloud solutions and support their implementation.
* Define, enhance, and maintain cloud architecture standards, governance frameworks, guardrails, and best practices.
* Develop reference architectures and reusable patterns to ensure consistency, scalability, and quality across cloud implementations.
* Contribute to cloud engineering capability development by mentoring teams and providing training on cloud technologies and practices.
* Drive cloud transformation and adoption initiatives across business and technology functions.
* Enhance cloud platforms through continuous improvements, architectural modernization, and implementation of new capabilities.
* Manage infrastructure provisioning, decommissioning, and lifecycle management activities.
* Act as a trusted advisor for cloud strategy, architecture, and migration initiatives.
* Evaluate emerging technologies, conduct proof\-of\-concept (PoC) activities, and recommend innovative cloud solutions.
* Review architecture deliverables and solutions at key project milestones to ensure compliance with standards and requirements.
* Troubleshoot infrastructure and platform incidents, perform root cause analysis (RCA), and implement preventive measures.
* Collaborate with engineering teams to define operating procedures and implementation approaches.
* Support Agile delivery teams through technical guidance, architecture reviews, and backlog planning.
* Ensure timely delivery of cloud solutions aligned with business objectives, quality standards, and operational requirements.
**Your Profile**
----------------


**Mandatory Skills**


* 12\+ years of experience in Cloud Architecture, Cloud Engineering, or Infrastructure Transformation projects.
* Strong expertise in Cloud Architecture and Solution Design.
* Experience designing, implementing, and supporting enterprise\-scale cloud infrastructure.
* Expertise in Cloud Platform Engineering and cloud\-native architecture patterns.
* Strong understanding of Cloud Transformation and Cloud Adoption strategies.
* Experience defining Cloud Governance frameworks, Guardrails, and Standards.
* Knowledge of Integration Architecture and Hybrid Cloud solutions.
* Experience with Infrastructure Provisioning, Automation, and Lifecycle Management.
* Strong understanding of Cloud Operations, Monitoring, and Support models.
* Experience in Incident Management, Root Cause Analysis (RCA), and Problem Resolution.
* Expertise in Cloud Security, Identity Management, Compliance, and Risk Management.
* Experience creating Reference Architectures, Design Patterns, and Technical Standards.
* Strong technical consulting, stakeholder management, and architecture leadership capabilities.
* Experience working in Agile and DevOps\-driven environments.

### **Preferred Skills**


#### **Cloud Platforms**


* Microsoft Azure
* Amazon Web Services (AWS)
* Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

#### **Infrastructure as Code (IaC)**


* Terraform
* Azure Bicep
* ARM Templates
* AWS CloudFormation

**Containerization \& Orchestration**


* Docker
* Kubernetes (AKS, EKS, GKE)
* OpenShift

**DevOps \& CI/CD**


* Azure DevOps
* GitHub Actions
* Jenkins
* GitLab CI/CD

**Source Control**


* Git
* GitHub
* Azure Repos
* Bitbucket

#### **Scripting \& Automation**


* PowerShell
* Python
* Bash/Shell Scripting

**Monitoring \& Observability**


* Azure Monitor
* Application Insights
* Prometheus
* Grafana
* AWS CloudWatch

#### **Collaboration \& ITSM**


* ServiceNow
* Jira
* Confluence

#### **Security \& Governance**


* Azure Policy
* Microsoft Defender for Cloud
* Azure Key Vault
* IAM/RBAC Solutions

**Soft Skills**


* Strong solution architecture and technical leadership capabilities.
* Excellent stakeholder management and consulting skills.
* Strong communication and presentation abilities.
* Ability to influence technical decisions and drive cloud adoption strategies.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Proactive and innovation\-focused mindset.
* Ability to mentor and enable engineering teams.
* Strong cross\-functional collaboration and teamwork skills.
* Customer\-focused approach with a commitment to delivery excellence.
**What You'll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to architect and lead large\-scale cloud transformation initiatives.
* Work with modern cloud\-native platforms and emerging technologies.
* Exposure to enterprise\-scale architecture, governance, and modernization programs.
* Collaborate with global teams of architects, engineers, and business leaders.
* Continuous learning and professional growth opportunities.
* Flexible work environment with a culture focused on innovation, engineering excellence, and business impact.
**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

title: Docusign - Developer or Senior Developer
description:
DocuSign Developer
  
**Years of Experience:** 3 to 9 years
  
**Work Location:** Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Gurgaon, Noida, Kolkata, Cochin, Coimbatore
  
Notice Period – Immediate to 30 Days
  
  

**About the Role:**  

We are seeking a skilled and experienced DocuSign Developer to join our team and lead the design, development, and integration of DocuSign eSignature and CLM solutions. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in DocuSign APIs, templates, workflows, and system integrations, with a passion for streamlining digital agreement processes.
  
  

**Key Responsibilities:**  

Design, develop, and maintain DocuSign eSignature and CLM solutions.
  
Create and manage templates, envelopes, PowerForms, and custom workflows.
  
Integrate DocuSign with internal systems (e.g., Salesforce, SharePoint, SAP, etc.) using REST APIs and SDKs.
  
Collaborate with business analysts and stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
  
Ensure compliance with security and data privacy standards.
  
Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to DocuSign functionality and integrations.
  
Provide documentation, training, and support to end\-users and internal teams.
  
  

**Required Qualifications:**  

5\+ years of hands\-on experience with DocuSign eSignature and/or CLM.
  
Proficiency in DocuSign APIs (REST, SOAP) and SDKs (Java, .NET, Node.js, etc.).
  
Experience with OAuth, JWT, and other authentication methods.
  
Strong understanding of document lifecycle management and digital signature workflows.
  
Experience integrating DocuSign with platforms like Salesforce, Microsoft 365, or custom applications.
  
Familiarity with JSON, XML, and scripting languages (JavaScript, Python, etc.).Excellent problem\-solving and communication skills.
  
  

**Preferred Qualifications:**  

DocuSign Developer Certification(s).
  
Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
  
Experience with other eSignature platforms is a plus.

title: Medical Devices Solutioning & AI Transformation
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Your Role**
-------------


As a Senior Professional – Medical Devices Solutioning \& AI Transformation, you will support solutioning, presales, proposal development, and AI\-led engineering transformation initiatives for Medical Devices and Life Sciences clients. You will work with account teams, solution architects, delivery leaders, AI specialists, and client stakeholders to develop differentiated solutions and business value propositions.


In this role, you will:


* Support solutioning for Medical Devices, Digital Health, Connected Products, Software Engineering, V\&V, Quality Engineering, and Sustaining Engineering opportunities.
* Contribute to RFPs, RFIs, solution narratives, estimations, staffing plans, and proposal development.
* Translate customer challenges into measurable business outcomes and engineering solutions.
* Participate in client discovery workshops, solution reviews, and presales discussions.
* Create reusable proposal assets, case studies, and solution templates.
* Identify AI and GenAI opportunities across engineering, quality, regulatory, validation, documentation, and post\-market processes.
* Support AI\-driven solutions for test automation, requirements analysis, defect analytics, productivity improvement, and knowledge management.
* Collaborate with AI CoEs and engineering teams to develop PoCs, accelerators, and adoption roadmaps.
* Support product engineering programs across design, development, verification, validation, release, maintenance, and sustenance.
* Prepare client presentations, business cases, and solution walkthroughs.
* Ensure proposed solutions are scalable, practical, and aligned with delivery capabilities.

----------------

* 10–15 years of experience in Medical Devices, Life Sciences, Engineering Services, Solutioning, or Presales.

* Strong understanding of Medical Device product development lifecycle.
* Experience in Software Engineering, Systems Engineering, Verification \& Validation, Quality Engineering, and Sustaining Engineering.
* Exposure to Digital Health, Connected Devices, AI/GenAI, Cloud, Data, and Analytics solutions.
* Knowledge of Quality Management Systems, Risk Management, Regulatory Compliance, and Post\-Market processes.
* Experience in solution architecture, proposal development, effort estimation, and transformation roadmaps.

### **Core Skills**


* Strong stakeholder management and client\-facing communication skills.
* Ability to articulate technical solutions in business\-friendly language.
* Excellent consulting, presentation, workshop facilitation, and problem\-solving capabilities.
* Experience collaborating with engineering, AI, quality, cybersecurity, and regulatory teams.

**What You'll Love About Working Here**

* Opportunity to shape AI\-driven transformation programs for leading Medical Device organizations.
* Exposure to emerging technologies including AI, GenAI, Digital Health, Cloud, and Connected Products.
* Collaborative culture focused on innovation, learning, and growth.

title: Data & Analytics
description:
**Your Role**
-------------


As a Data \& Analytics Architect, you will be responsible for designing end\-to\-end data architectures, establishing data standards and frameworks, and enabling business\-driven analytics solutions. You will collaborate with business stakeholders, engineering teams, and governance functions to deliver scalable, secure, and high\-quality data ecosystems.
**In this role, you will:**
---------------------------


* Define, design, and lead the implementation of end\-to\-end scalable data architectures from concept through production deployment.
* Ensure alignment of data solutions with enterprise architecture standards, business objectives, and industry best practices.
* Collaborate with compliance, privacy, risk, security, platform, and operations teams to incorporate all business and regulatory requirements into data solutions.
* Develop data strategies, architectures, and policies covering:
* Data Governance
* Master Data Management (MDM)
* Metadata Management
* Data Quality
* Data Security and Privacy
* Provide technical leadership and act as a trusted advisor for data\-related initiatives across programs.
* Define and establish scalable, reusable standards, frameworks, and best practices for data architecture and analytics.
* Lead data analysis activities including data profiling, transformation design, integration requirements, and quality assessments.
* Design, document, and maintain conceptual, logical, and physical data models.
* Oversee the complete data lifecycle, ensuring high\-quality, scalable, and maintainable data solutions.
* Guide development teams on architecture, implementation approaches, governance, and continuous improvement practices.
* Conduct advanced analytics to generate actionable insights, identify trends, and measure key business outcomes.
* Design visual analytics and dashboards that enable effective decision\-making across stakeholders.
* Apply statistical and analytical techniques to solve complex business problems and uncover business value.
* Collaborate with data engineers, analysts, scientists, and platform teams to implement scalable analytics solutions.
* Drive quality, governance, and delivery excellence across data and analytics initiatives.
* Manage and optimize large\-scale structured and unstructured datasets for reporting, analytics, and business intelligence use cases.
**Your Profile**
----------------


### **Mandatory Skills**


* 12\+ years of experience in Data Architecture, Analytics, and Enterprise Data Management.
* Strong expertise in Data Architecture and Data Modeling techniques.
* Hands\-on experience in Data Engineering and Data Integration (ETL/ELT).
* Deep understanding of Data Warehousing and Lakehouse Architecture.
* Experience implementing Data Governance, Data Quality, and Master Data Management frameworks.
* Strong capabilities in Data Analysis, Data Profiling, and Data Transformation.
* Experience designing Business Intelligence and Data Visualization solutions.
* Expertise in Statistical Analysis, Predictive Analytics, and Data Mining methodologies.
* Experience working with Big Data platforms and distributed data processing frameworks.
* Proficiency in SQL and programming languages such as Python and PySpark.
* Strong understanding of Cloud Data Platforms and modern analytics architectures.
* Experience in Data Security, Privacy, Compliance, and Regulatory requirements.
* Knowledge of DataOps, CI/CD practices, and automation frameworks.
* Strong stakeholder management, consulting, and technical leadership skills

**Job Title:** LEAD ADMINISTRATOR L1(CONTRACT)
  
**City:** Pune
  
**State/Province:** Maharashtra
  
**Posting Start Date:** 7/16/26
  
**Wipro Limited (NYSE:** WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future\-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our customers, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever\-changing world. For additional information, visit us at www.wipro.com.
  
  

**Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Endpoint Automation Engineer – Aternity
  
  

Exp \- 6 \- 9 years
  
Loaciton \- Pune
  
  

Rates including mark up\- 150 \- 155 K/M
  
  

͏
  
  

"Role Purpose Drive endpoint self\-healing and remediation automation through Aternity by building, signing, deploying, and operating PowerShell\-based automations executed via Aternity Runbooks.
  
  

The role focuses on turning Aternity insights (performance, stability, and user\-impact signals) into safe, repeatable remediation and optimization actions across the endpoint estate.
  
  

Strong scripting and secure automation practices are the priority;
  
  

Aternity platform knowledge is desirable but can be learned quickly by a capable automation engineer.
  
  

͏
  
  

Principal Accountabilities and Responsibilities
  
  

A. Business, Customers, and Stakeholders · Deliver measurable reduction in endpoint vulnerabilities and recurring incidents through automation\-led remediation. · Partner with Security, EUC/Workspace, Service Management, and Operations to prioritize high\-impact remediation use cases. · Enable faster recovery and reduced user disruption by implementing targeted self\-healing actions. · Provide clear reporting on remediation outcomes (coverage, success/failure rate, time\-to\-remediate, risk reduction). · Support audit and compliance needs with traceable change records and execution evidence.
  
  

B. Internal / Operational Responsibilities · Develop robust PowerShell scripts for detection, remediation, rollback, and post\-remediation validation. · Sign scripts and manage secure script execution controls in line with enterprise policy. · Build and maintain Aternity runbooks, targeting logic, phased rollout, and scheduling. · Execute controlled deployments (pilot/canary/global), monitor runtime outcomes, and optimize based on telemetry. · Troubleshoot failed remediations and maintain reusable script/runbook standards. · Maintain documentation, version control, and operational playbooks for support continuity.
  
  

C. Risk, Governance, and Controls · Follow secure coding and change governance practices. · Ensure scripts are idempotent, logged, and rollback capable. · Validate compatibility across device types, OS versions, and user contexts. · Reconcile reporting variances across tools/dashboards when required. · Support secure authentication practices for automation integrations, including OAuth 2\.0 token\-based flows.
  
  

3\) Functional Knowledge Core (Must Have) · Advanced PowerShell scripting in enterprise environments. · Hands\-on script signing and execution policy governance. · Strong understanding of endpoint remediation patterns (registry/services/files/processes/app lifecycle). ·
  
  

Experience with controlled enterprise deployment practices (pilot, phased rollout, rollback, validation). · Strong troubleshooting and operational support skills for endpoint automation. · Working knowledge of OAuth 2\.0 (client credentials, access tokens, refresh patterns, API auth handling).
  
  

Preferred (Good to Have) · Hands\-on Aternity experience (runbooks/workflows/actions/telemetry/dashboarding). · Experience integrating automation scripts with authenticated APIs. · Exposure to vulnerability remediation and patch compliance programs. · Experience with MECM/Intune or similar endpoint management tooling. · Basic macOS scripting/remediation exposure."
  
  

͏
  
  

Deliver
  
  

No Performance Parameter Measure
  
1 Operations of the tower SLA adherence
  
Knowledge management
  
CSAT/ Customer Experience
  
Identification of risk issues and mitigation plans
  
Knowledge management
  
2 New projects Timely delivery
  
Avoid unauthorised changes
  
No formal escalations
  
͏
  
**Mandatory Skills:** UxM \- NexThink .
  
  

**Experience:** 5\-8 Years .
  
  

Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. **Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

The purpose of the role is to provide effective technical support to the process and actively resolve client issues directly or through timely escalation to meet process SLAs
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
  

Support process by managing transactions as per required quality standards
  
Fielding all incoming help requests from clients via telephone and/or emails in a courteous manner
  
Document all pertinent end user identification information, including name, department, contact information and nature of problem or issue
  
Update own availability in the RAVE system to ensure productivity of the process
  
Record, track, and document all queries received, problem\-solving steps taken and total successful and unsuccessful resolutions
  
Follow standard processes and procedures to resolve all client queries
  
Resolve client queries as per the SLAÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂs defined in the contract
  
Access and maintain internal knowledge bases, resources and frequently asked questions to aid in and provide effective problem resolution to clients
  
Identify and learn appropriate product details to facilitate better client interaction and troubleshooting
  
Document and analyze call logs to spot most occurring trends to prevent future problems
  
Maintain and update self\-help documents for customers to speed up resolution time
  
Identify red flags and escalate serious client issues to Team leader in cases of untimely resolution
  
Ensure all product information and disclosures are given to clients before and after the call/email requests
  
Avoids legal challenges by complying with service agreements
  
͏
  
Deliver excellent customer service through effective diagnosis and troubleshooting of client queries
  
Provide product support and resolution to clients by performing a question diagnosis while guiding users through step\-by\-step solutions
  
Assist clients with navigating around product menus and facilitate better understanding of product features
  
Troubleshoot all client queries in a user\-friendly, courteous and professional manner
  
Maintain logs and records of all customer queries as per the standard procedures and guidelines
  
Accurately process and record all incoming call and email using the designated tracking software
  
Offer alternative solutions to clients (where appropriate) with the objective of retaining customersÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ and clientsÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ business
  
Organize ideas and effectively communicate oral messages appropriate to listeners and situations
  
Follow up and make scheduled call backs to customers to record feedback and ensure compliance to contract /SLAs
  
͏
  
Build capability to ensure operational excellence and maintain superior customer service levels of the existing account/client
  
Undertake product trainings to stay current with product features, changes and updates
  
Enroll in product specific and any other trainings per client requirements/recommendations
  
Partner with team leaders to brainstorm and identify training themes and learning issues to better serve the client
  
Update job knowledge by participating in self learning opportunities and maintaining personal networks
  
͏
  
  

Deliver
  
  

No Performance Parameter Measure
  
1 Process No. of cases resolved per day, compliance to process and quality standards, meeting process level SLAs, Pulse score, Customer feedback
  
2 Self\- Management Productivity, efficiency, absenteeism, Training Hours, No of technical training completed

title: Lead Pharma Solution Architect
description:
**Your Role**


As a Lead Pharma Solution Architect / SI SME, you will drive strategic consulting, AMS assessments, solutioning, proposal leadership, and transformation initiatives for global Life Sciences clients. You will serve as a trusted advisor to business and technology stakeholders, helping organizations optimize their application landscape, modernize operations, and accelerate business value realization across the pharmaceutical value chain.


This role requires strong Pharma domain expertise combined with experience in AMS solutioning, application portfolio assessment, transformation roadmap definition, and stakeholder management.


In this role, you will:


* Lead Pharma AMS assessments, solutioning engagements, and proposal development activities for global clients.
* Conduct application portfolio analysis, application rationalization, and modernization assessments across the Pharma ecosystem.
* Facilitate executive workshops, discovery sessions, and stakeholder interviews to identify business challenges and transformation opportunities.
* Develop target operating models, transformation roadmaps, solution blueprints, and strategic recommendations.
* Lead application inventory assessments, criticality mapping, and support model definition exercises and operational excellence programs within Life Sciences.

**Your Profile**


Functional Expertise


Pharma Domain Experience


Strong expertise across one or more of the following domains:


* Pharma Research \& Development (R\&D)
* Laboratory Informatics \& Scientific Applications
* Clinical Development

**What You'll Love About Working Here**


* Opportunity to shape strategic transformation programs for leading global pharmaceutical organizations.
* Exposure to complex Pharma business processes spanning R\&D through Commercial operations.
* Leadership role in high\-impact AMS, modernization, and digital transformation engagements.
* Collaborative environment focused on innovation, consulting excellence, and continuous learning.
* Access to global experts, emerging technologies, and industry\-leading practices.
* Strong career growth opportunities within a global Life Sciences consulting and technology organization.

**About Capgemini in India**


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations realize their future through technology, data, and people. With nearly 60 years of heritage, Capgemini is a responsible and diverse organization with 420,000 team members across more than 50 countries. The Group reported global revenues of €22\.1 billion in 2024\.


Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations, including Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Noida, Gurugram, and more. We deliver end\-to\-end services across strategy, technology, engineering, and operations.


Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in
