title: Associate Director – Communications
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
Cognizant is seeking an accomplished professional to join the India Communications team and shape its external narrative in India. Based in India and working closely with both the India and global communications teams, the Associate Director will help drive media relations, executive thought leadership, financial and earnings communications, and crisis response for one of the world's leading professional services and technology companies. This is a hands\-on role for someone who combines strong editorial craft with sharp media judgement.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Build and sustain strong media relations with mainstream, business and technology journalists across India.
  
Draft and edit a wide range of external materials to a high standard, including media pitches, op\-eds, executive statements, holding statements, press releases and backgrounders, ensuring a consistent voice and message across all outbound communications.
  
Develop and manage thought\-leadership program for C\-suite and senior executives, from ideation through to placement, shaping their profiles and points of view in priority media and forums.
  
Manage PR around financial results and earnings in close coordination with the India and global communications, investor relations and finance teams, ensuring accuracy, consistency and alignment with disclosure requirements.
  
Anticipate, prepare for and respond to reputational and crisis situations, developing holding statements, Q\&A and response plans calmly and credibly under pressure.
  
Partner with global communications, marketing, HR, business and regional teams to align India communications with enterprise priorities.
  
Work closely with in\-house teams to get the best out of PR agency partners.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
12–15 years of experience in corporate communications, public relations or journalism, with a strong record in external and media communications.
  
Ideally, at least five years in a listed technology company, with an understanding of the disclosure sensitivities and rhythms of a public company.
  
Established, credible relationships with mainstream and technology journalists in India.
  
Excellent written and oral communication skills, with the ability to draft and edit op\-eds, statements, pitches and backgrounds that are clear, sharp and on\-message.
  
Demonstrated ability to develop thought leadership for senior executives.
  
Proven crisis and issues\-management capability, with sound judgement under pressure.
  
Comfortable working across time zones and in tandem with global teams.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Sharp media judgement paired with strong editorial craft.
  
Ability to stay calm, clear and credible under pressure.
  
Strong cross\-functional collaboration skills across global and regional teams.
  
  

A proactive, ownership\-driven approach to managing India's external narrative.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. Based on this role's business requirements, this is a hybrid position requiring a minimum of 3 days a week in a Cognizant office. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: Cyber Architect
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


**Your Role**
-------------


The Cyber Architect will define, validate, and drive cybersecurity architecture for Automotive ECU programs, ensuring compliance with automotive cybersecurity standards while supporting risk assessments, security feature implementation, validation, and incident remediation.
**In this role, you will:**
---------------------------


**Ideal Candidate Profile**
---------------------------


* **Experience:** 8–15\+ years in Embedded/Automotive Cybersecurity.
* **Domain:** Automotive OEM, Tier\-1 supplier, or Automotive Cybersecurity consulting.
* **Technical Depth:** ECU architecture, AUTOSAR, TARA, cryptography, secure diagnostics, penetration testing.
* **Leadership:** Ability to guide architecture decisions and influence cross\-functional teams.
* **Compliance Knowledge:** Strong understanding of ISO 21434 and UNECE cybersecurity requirements.

### **Overall Hiring Weightage**


* Automotive Cybersecurity Architecture – **30%**
* TARA \& Risk Management – **20%**
* Embedded Security \& Cryptography – **20%**
* Security Validation/Pen Testing – **15%**
* Automotive Standards \& Compliance – **10%**
* Communication \& Leadership – **5%**

This profile aligns most closely with a **Senior Cybersecurity Architect / Lead Cybersecurity Engineer** supporting automotive ECU programs.


**Your Profile**
----------------


**Key Technical Competencies**
------------------------------


### **Must\-Have Skills**


### **Automotive ECU Architecture**


* + ECU design and integration
	+ AUTOSAR Classic and Adaptive architectures
	+ Embedded software lifecycle
* **Automotive Networks \& Diagnostics**


	+ CAN, CAN\-FD
	+ Automotive Ethernet
	+ UDS
	+ DoIP
* **Automotive Cryptography**


	+ AES/AES\-CMAC
	+ Key Management
	+ HSM/SHE
	+ Message Authentication Codes (MAC)
* **Automotive Security Mechanisms**


	+ SecOC
	+ Diagnostic Security Hardening
	+ Secure Boot
	+ Secure Flashing
	+ Authentication \& Authorization
* **Threat Analysis \& Risk Assessment (TARA)**


	+ Asset identification
	+ Attack path analysis
	+ Risk scoring
	+ Mitigation planning
* **Security Validation**


	+ Penetration Testing
	+ Vulnerability Assessment
	+ Security Testing Methodologies
* **Software Supply Chain Security**


	+ SBOM
	+ SPDX
	+ Open\-source licensing compliance
* **Automotive Cybersecurity Standards**


	+ ISO 21434
	+ UNECE R155/R156
	+ Security Engineering Processes
### **Preferred Skills**


* HARDN
* MAC3
* ECSEC
* Hands\-on cybersecurity feature implementation in OEM programs
* Incident response and vulnerability remediation experience
**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

Enterprise technology must do much more than keep the wheels turning; it is the engine that drives functional excellence and the enabler of innovation and long\-term growth. Learn more about ET\&P

* The Functional Lead – Oracle Supply Chain Management (SCM) will be responsible for designing, implementing, and optimizing Oracle SCM Cloud solutions to support enterprise supply chain operations. The role will partner with business and technology stakeholders to design scalable solutions, streamline supply chain processes, and drive successful Oracle Cloud implementations while ensuring operational efficiency and user adoption.
* Key Responsibilities
* 1\. Functional Delivery \& Solution Design
* Conduct business process workshops and gather functional requirements from supply chain stakeholders.
* Design end\-to\-end Oracle SCM Cloud solutions across Procure\-to\-Pay (P2P), Procurement, Inventory Management, Order Management, and Logistics processes.
* Prepare functional design documents, solution specifications, and configuration documentation.
* Ensure solutions align with Oracle Cloud best practices and business objectives.

* Lead end\-to\-end Oracle SCM Cloud implementation projects.
* Configure Oracle SCM Cloud modules, including:
* Procurement
* Self Service Procurement
* Purchasing
* Inventory Management
* Product Information Management (PIM)
* Order Management
* Shipping
* Cost Management
* Planning (preferred)
* Support integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC), REST/SOAP APIs, and other enterprise integration technologies.
* Lead System Integration Testing (SIT), User Acceptance Testing (UAT), production deployments, and quarterly Oracle Cloud release validation.


**Key skills required**


* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Ability to translate business requirements into scalable Oracle SCM Cloud solutions.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Collaborative team player with the ability to work across business and technical teams.
* Detail\-oriented with a focus on quality and continuous improvement.
* Passion for process optimization, automation, and operational excellence.

title: IT Internal Audit Analyst
description:
**About Accenture:**


Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security. Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services and Accenture Song—all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 710,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities. Visit us at accenture.com

 **About Entity:**

  

The Internal Audit Department provides the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors with an independent and objective assessment of the reliability and integrity of financial and select operating information, the effectiveness and efficiency of Accenture plc and its consolidated subsidiaries’ (the “Company”) systems and internal controls, and compliance with the Company’s policies and procedures. Internal Audit Services also provides advisory services designed to add value and improve the Company’s operations through bringing a systematic, disciplined approach to evaluate and improve the effectiveness of risk management, controls, operations, and governance processes.

 **Why should you join the Accenture team:**

  

* Opportunity to learn from a best\-in\-class Internal Audit organization
* Know emerging technologies including Cloud, Robotics Process Automation, AI, Industrial IOT and Metaverse and associated risk management
* Gain hands\-on experience on auditing core technologies and operational processes
* Shadowing and training experiences with knowledgeable professionals
* Opportunity to network with some of the best minds in the IT industry that pioneers in innovation
* Flexible working schedule / work from home

 **You Are:**


An agile, highly motivated, innovative thinker with a passion for technology, collaboration, and creative problem\-solving looking to join a fast\-paced, global internal audit organization that has embraced transformative capabilities including advanced analytics, dynamic risk assessment processes, and automation to retain its role as a trusted advisor to the business.

 **The Work:**

  

* Learn the methodology designed by Internal Audit to conduct comprehensive risk assessments and audits on enterprise scale applications and systems, services delivered to clients from multiple industries and post\-merger integration of acquired entities
* Participate in execution of the risk\-based audit plan, reporting results to Accenture Leadership and the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors
* Conduct a wide\-ranging scope of audits with an emphasis on assessing emerging areas of risk including cyber security, artificial intelligence, cloud computing, robotic process automation, and the Internet of Things.
* Through advisory services, work with our business partners to help them proactively identify and manage risk in new technologies, new go\-to\-market offerings, and critical corporate initiatives.
* Shape the future of the Accenture Internal Audit through involvement in departmental initiatives that enable us to become more efficient and effective in everything we do.
* Ensure your technical skill set and business acumen stay current and relevant through participation in our robust training program.

 **Desired Skills \& Qualifications**

* Undergraduate degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Information Security, or Business Administration with good academic record
* Understanding of information security domains and associated control requirements and awareness of some industry leading frameworks on risk management and compliance.
* Strong verbal and written communication
* Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Ability to collaborate with multiple teams in different time zones
* No active backlogs during application and/or during onboarding.
* Candidate should not have appeared for Accenture Recruitment assessment / interview process in last three months.
* Candidates must be eligible to work in India by citizenship/ have relevant work permit documents.
* Please note that Bhutan and Nepal nationals can work in India without a need for obtaining a work visa. All other foreign nationals require work visa or an Overseas Citizenship of India (OCI) or Person of Indian Origin (PIO) card to work in India
* undefined

Accenture's criterion for hiring candidates is merit. title: SC&E Analyst
description:
**Work Location:** Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru \| **Years of experience: 3**\+ years **\| Entity:** India Business \| **Level**: 11\-SC\&E\- Analyst

**Key responsibilities**


Drive client value creation


* Understand the client’s business, priorities and leadership agenda
* Co\-create with the client, articulate transformation and drive innovation agenda for the client
* Align the right teams or capabilities to enable (sell and deliver) successful transformation/innovation agenda


Build long\-standing, trust\-based relationships

* Establish self as a trusted advisor with the client C\-suite through an in\-depth understanding of the client as well as industry
* Build networks at Accenture to be able to bring the best of Accenture to the client


Grow the business/account

* Help originate deals based on defined commercial pathways; drive innovative deal construct and solutioning to grow business
* Delivery ownership and excellence

**Professional qualifications**

* Rich experience in the SC\&E with in\-depth industry expertise including the industry/digital/technology trends.
* Demonstrate sustained client relations management experience at a C\-suite level or operated at a senior management level in the industry role.
* Experience in consulting and account management experience; domestic consulting experience preferred.


.

**What’s in\-store for you?**

* **Learn and grow continuously:** Build new skills, grow existing skills, develop new areas of expertise within functional, technical or industry areas of the business with Accenture’s unmatched 24/7 expert\-curated learning boards, webinars and classroom\-style training programs
* **Innovate:** Get access to resources that will allow you to leverage the latest technologies and bring innovation to life with the world’s most recognizable companies
* **Thrive and advance:** Grow your career as far as your ambitions take you.
* **Truly human:** Bring your whole self to a company that aims to be the most diverse in the world and delivers real\-time performance feedback based on your strengths, not stats

  

**Educational qualifications**

* Master’s degree in business administration (MBA) or post graduate degree in management (PGDM) from premier institutes preferred
